title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 뭘 드릴까요? 
여자: 아침부터 머리가 아파요. 약 좀 주세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi có thể giúp gì cho cô? 
Nữ: Tôi bị đau đầu từ sáng. Cho tôi một ít thuốc.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Qu'est-ce que je peux t'offrir ?
Femme : J'ai mal à la tête depuis ce matin. S'il vous plaît, donnez-moi des médicaments.

#######

Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Qué puedo traerte?
Mujer: Tengo dolor de cabeza desde esta mañana. Por favor, dame un poco de medicina.

#######

Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apa yang bisa saya dapatkan dari Anda?
Wanita: Saya sudah sakit kepala sejak pagi ini. Tolong beri saya obat.

#######

Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: 何を手に入れますか?
女：朝から頭が痛いです。薬をください。

#######

Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Was kann ich Ihnen bringen?
Frau: Ich habe seit heute Morgen Kopfschmerzen. Bitte geben Sie mir ein Medikament.

#######

Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：我能给你什么？
女人：我从早上开始就头疼。请给我一些药。

#######

Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：我能給你什麼？
女人：我從早上開始就頭疼。請給我一些藥。

#######

Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Cosa posso portarti?
Donna: Ho mal di testa da stamattina. Per favore, dammi un po' di medicina.

#######

Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Что я могу тебе подарить?
Женщина: У меня с утра болит голова. Пожалуйста, дайте мне лекарство.

#######

Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ฉันจะซื้ออะไรให้คุณ?
ผู้หญิง: ฉันปวดหัวตั้งแต่เช้าแล้ว กรุณาให้ยาฉันหน่อย

#######

Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: O que posso trazer para você?
Mulher: Estou com dor de cabeça desde esta manhã. Por favor, me dê um remédio.

#######

Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: मैं तुम्हें क्या ला सकता हूँ?
महिला: आज सुबह से मेरे सिर में दर्द हो रहा है. कृपया मुझे कुछ दवा दीजिए.

#######

Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Sana ne alabilirim?
Kadın: Sabahtan beri başım ağrıyor. Lütfen bana biraz ilaç ver.

#######

Man: What can I get you?
Woman: I've had a headache since this morning. Please give me some medicine.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 오늘 수업은 여기까지입니다. 
남자: 저, 질문이 있습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Buổi học hôm nay kết thúc tại đây. 
Nam: Ờm, em có câu hỏi ạ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Le cours d'aujourd'hui se termine ici.
Homme : Eh bien, j'ai une question.

#######

Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: La clase de hoy termina aquí.
Hombre: Bueno, tengo una pregunta.

#######

Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Kelas hari ini berakhir di sini.
Pria: Nah, saya punya pertanyaan.

#######

Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：今日の授業はここで終わります。
男：さて、質問があります。

#######

Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Der heutige Unterricht endet hier.
Mann: Nun, ich habe eine Frage.

#######

Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：今天的课到此结束。
男：嗯，我有一个问题。

#######

Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：今天的課到此結束。
男：嗯，我有一個問題。

#######

Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: La lezione di oggi finisce qui.
Uomo: Beh, ho una domanda.

#######

Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Сегодняшний урок заканчивается.
Мужчина: Хорошо, у меня есть вопрос.

#######

Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ชั้นเรียนวันนี้สิ้นสุดที่นี่
ชาย : ครับ ผมมีคำถามครับ

#######

Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: A aula de hoje termina aqui.
Homem: Bem, eu tenho uma pergunta.

#######

Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: आज की कक्षा यहीं समाप्त होती है।
आदमी: अच्छा, मेरा एक सवाल है।

#######

Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Bugünkü ders burada bitiyor.
Adam: Peki, bir sorum var.

#######

Woman: Today's class ends here.
Man: Well, I have a question.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 실례합니다. 책은 몇 권까지 빌릴 수 있어요? 
여자: 다섯 권요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Xin lỗi. Tôi có thể mượn tối đa mấy cuốn sách ạ. 
Nữ: Năm cuốn nhé.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Excusez-moi. Combien de livres puis-je emprunter ?
Femme : Vous pouvez emprunter cinq livres.

#######

Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Disculpe. ¿Cuántos libros puedo tomar prestados?
Mujer: Puedes pedir prestados cinco libros.

#######

Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Permisi. Berapa banyak buku yang bisa saya pinjam?
Wanita: Anda dapat meminjam lima buku.

#######

Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：すみません。何冊借りられますか？
女：5冊借りられます。

#######

Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Entschuldigung. Wie viele Bücher kann ich ausleihen?
Frau: Sie können fünf Bücher ausleihen.

#######

Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：对不起。我可以借多少本书？
女：你可以借五本书。

#######

Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：對不起。我可以藉多少本書？
女：你可以藉五本書。

#######

Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Mi scusi. Quanti libri posso prendere in prestito?
Donna: Puoi prendere in prestito cinque libri.

#######

Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Извините. Сколько книг я могу одолжить?
Женщина: Ты можешь одолжить пять книг.

#######

Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย : ขอโทษครับ. ฉันสามารถยืมหนังสือได้กี่เล่ม?
ผู้หญิง: คุณสามารถยืมหนังสือได้ห้าเล่ม

#######

Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Com licença. Quantos livros posso emprestar?
Mulher: Você pode pegar cinco livros emprestados.

#######

Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: क्षमा करें. मैं कितनी किताबें उधार ले सकता हूँ?
महिला: आप पाँच किताबें उधार ले सकते हैं।

#######

Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Özür dilerim. Kaç kitap ödünç alabilirim?
Kadın: Beş kitap ödünç alabilirsin.

#######

Man: Excuse me. How many books can I borrow?
Woman: You can borrow five books.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 우리 여기서 배드민턴 칠까요? 
남자: 여기는 축구를 하는 학생들이 있으니까 저쪽으로 가요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Chúng ta chơi cầu lông ở đây nhé? 
Nam: Ở đây đang có mấy học sinh đang đá bóng, vậy nên chúng ta ra đằng kia chơi đi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Allons-nous jouer au badminton ici ?
Homme : Il y a des étudiants qui jouent au football ici, alors allons-y.

#######

Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Jugamos bádminton aquí?
Hombre: Aquí hay unos estudiantes jugando al fútbol, ​​así que vamos para allá.

#######

Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Bagaimana kalau kita bermain bulu tangkis di sini?
Man: Ada beberapa siswa bermain sepak bola di sini, jadi mari kita pergi ke sana.

#######

Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：ここでバドミントンしませんか？
男：ここでサッカーをしている学生が何人かいるから、あちらに行きましょう。

#######

Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Sollen wir hier Badminton spielen?
Mann: Hier spielen ein paar Studenten Fußball, also lass uns da rüber gehen.

#######

Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：我们在这里打羽毛球好吗？
男：这里有学生在踢足球，我们过去吧。

#######

Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：我們在這裡打羽毛球好嗎？
男：這裡有學生在踢足球，我們過去吧。

#######

Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Giochiamo a badminton qui?
Uomo: Ci sono degli studenti che giocano a calcio qui, quindi andiamo laggiù.

#######

Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Давайте поиграем здесь в бадминтон?
Мужчина: Здесь несколько студентов играют в футбол, так что пойдем туда.

#######

Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: เรามาเล่นแบดมินตันที่นี่กันไหม?
ผู้ชาย: มีนักเรียนเล่นฟุตบอลอยู่ที่นี่ งั้นเราไปที่นั่นกันดีกว่า

#######

Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Vamos jogar badminton aqui?
Homem: Tem uns alunos jogando futebol aqui, então vamos lá.

#######

Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्या हम यहां बैडमिंटन खेलेंगे?
आदमी: यहाँ कुछ छात्र फ़ुटबॉल खेल रहे हैं, तो चलो वहाँ चलते हैं।

#######

Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Burada badminton oynayalım mı?
Adam: Burada futbol oynayan bazı öğrenciler var, hadi oraya gidelim.

#######

Woman: Shall we play badminton here?
Man: There are some students playing soccer here, so let's go over there.

남자: 지금 편지를 보내면 내일까지 도착할 수 있을까요?

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Woman: Yes, it will arrive by tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Femme : Oui, il arrivera d'ici demain.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 한국의 옛날 그림은 몇 층에 있어요? 
남자: 2층에서 보실 수 있습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nam: Cô có thể xem chúng ở tầng 2.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: What floor are the old Korean paintings on?
Man: You can see them on the second floor.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : À quel étage se trouvent les anciennes peintures coréennes ?
Homme : Vous pouvez les voir au deuxième étage.

#######

Man: You can see them on the second floor.

Man: You can see them on the second floor.

Homem: Você pode vê-los no segundo andar.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 여권 만들 거예요. 잘 찍어 주세요. 
남자: 네, 여기 보세요. 찍습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tôi sẽ làm hộ chiếu. Hãy chụp đẹp cho tôi. 
Nam: Vâng, cô hãy nhìn vào đây. Tôi chụp nhé.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Je vais faire un passeport. Merci de me faire une bonne photo.
Homme : Bien sûr, regarde ici. Je le prends maintenant.

#######

Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Voy a hacer un pasaporte. Por favor, toma una buena foto para mí.
Hombre: Claro, mira aquí. Lo tomo ahora.

#######

Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Saya akan membuat paspor. Tolong ambilkan gambar yang bagus untukku.
Pria: Tentu, lihat di sini. saya ambil sekarang.

#######

Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：パスポートを作ります。私のために良い写真を撮ってください。
男: はい、ここを見てください。私は今それを取ります。

#######

Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Ich mache einen Pass. Bitte mach ein gutes Bild für mich.
Mann: Klar, schau mal hier. Ich nehme es jetzt.

#######

Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：我去办护照。请为我拍一张好照片。
男：当然，看这里。我现在接受。

#######

Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：我去辦護照。請為我拍一張好照片。
男：當然，看這裡。我現在接受。

#######

Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Farò un passaporto. Per favore, fammi una bella foto.
Uomo: Certo, guarda qui. Lo prendo ora.

#######

Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Я сделаю паспорт. Пожалуйста, сделай мне хороший снимок.
Мужчина: Конечно, посмотри сюда. Я принимаю это сейчас.

#######

Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ฉันจะทำหนังสือเดินทาง ขอเก็บภาพสวยๆ มาฝากครับ
ผู้ชาย: แน่นอนดูที่นี่ ฉันรับมันตอนนี้

#######

Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Vou fazer um passaporte. Por favor, tire uma boa foto para mim.
Homem: Claro, olhe aqui. Eu aceito agora.

#######

Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मैं पासपोर्ट बनवा दूंगी. कृपया मेरे लिए एक अच्छी तस्वीर लें।
आदमी: ज़रूर, यहाँ देखो। मैं इसे अभी लेता हूं.

#######

Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Pasaport yapacağım. Lütfen benim için güzel bir fotoğraf çekin.
Adam: Tabii, buraya bak. Şimdi alıyorum.

#######

Woman: I'll make a passport. Please take a good picture for me.
Man: Sure, look here. I take it now.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 뭘 드릴까요? 
남자: 장미가 예쁘네요. 장미 주세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Woman: What can I get you?
Man: These roses are pretty. I will buy roses.

Homme : Ces roses sont jolies. Je vais acheter des roses.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 어서 오세요, 손님. 어디까지 가세요? 
여자: 한국대학교로 가 주세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Xin mời vào. Quý khách muốn đi đâu ạ? 
Nữ: Cho tôi tới trường Đại học Hankuk.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Bienvenue, madame. Où veux-tu aller?
Femme : Veuillez vous rendre à l'Université de Hankuk.

#######

Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Bienvenida, señora. ¿A donde quieres ir?
Mujer: Por favor, ve a la Universidad de Hankuk.

#######

Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Selamat datang, Bu. Ke mana kamu mau pergi?
Wanita: Silakan pergi ke Universitas Hankuk.

#######

Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: ようこそ、マダム。どこへ行きたい？
女性:韓国大学に行ってください。

#######

Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Willkommen, Madam. Wohin willst du gehen?
Frau: Bitte gehen Sie zur Hankuk University.

#######

Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：欢迎，女士。你想去哪里？
女：请去韩国大学。

#######

Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：歡迎，女士。你想去哪裡？
女：請去韓國大學。

#######

Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Benvenuta, signora. Dove vuoi andare?
Donna: Per favore, vai alla Hankuk University.

#######

Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Добро пожаловать, мадам. Куда ты хочешь пойти?
Женщина: Пожалуйста, поступайте в Университет Ханкук.

#######

Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย : ยินดีต้อนรับครับคุณผู้หญิง คุณอยากไปที่ไหน?
ผู้หญิง: กรุณาไปที่มหาวิทยาลัยฮันกุก

#######

Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Bem-vinda, senhora. Onde você quer ir?
Mulher: Por favor, vá para a Universidade Hankuk.

#######

Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: स्वागत है मैडम. आप कहाँ जाना चाहते हैं?
महिला: कृपया हनकुक विश्वविद्यालय जाएँ।

#######

Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Hoş geldiniz hanımefendi. Nereye gitmek istersin?
Kadın: Lütfen Hankuk Üniversitesi'ne gidin.

#######

Man: Welcome, madam. Where do you want to go?
Woman: Please go to Hankuk University.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 방은 5충이고요, 501호입니다. 
남자: 네. 아침 식사 시간은 언제예요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Phòng anh ở tầng 5, phòng 501 ạ. 
Nam: Vâng. Bữa sáng vào lúc mấy giờ vậy?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Your room is on the 5th floor, room 501.
Man: OK. When is breakfast time?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Votre chambre est au 5ème étage, chambre 501.
Homme : D'accord. Quand est l'heure du petit déjeuner ?

#######

Woman: Your room is on the 5th floor, room 501.
Man: OK. When is breakfast time?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Tu habitación está en el quinto piso, habitación 501.
Hombre: Está bien. ¿Cuándo es la hora del desayuno?

#######

Woman: Your room is on the 5th floor, room 501.
Man: OK. When is breakfast time?

Wanita: Kamarmu ada di lantai 5, kamar 501.
Pria: Oke. Kapan waktu sarapan?

#######

Woman: Your room is on the 5th floor, room 501.
Man: OK. When is breakfast time?

女：あなたの部屋は5階の501号室です。
男: わかりました。朝食の時間は？

#######

Woman: Your room is on the 5th floor, room 501.
Man: OK. When is breakfast time?

Frau: Ihr Zimmer ist im 5. Stock, Zimmer 501.
Mann: Okay. Wann ist Frühstückszeit?

#######

Woman: Your room is on the 5th floor, room 501.
Man: OK. When is breakfast time?

男：好的。早餐时间是什么时候？

#######

Woman: Your room is on the 5th floor, room 501.
Man: OK. When is breakfast time?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：你的房間在五樓501房間。
男：好的。早餐時間是什麼時候？

#######

Woman: Your room is on the 5th floor, room 501.
Man: OK. When is breakfast time?
g_text_audio_translate.it:

Uomo: Va bene. Quand'è l'ora della colazione?

#######

Woman: Your room is on the 5th floor, room 501.
Man: OK. When is breakfast time?
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Ваша комната на 5 этаже, номер 501.
Мужчина: ОК. Когда время завтрака?

#######

Woman: Your room is on the 5th floor, room 501.
Man: OK. When is breakfast time?

ผู้ชาย: โอเค เมื่อไหร่จะถึงเวลาอาหารเช้า?

#######

Woman: Your room is on the 5th floor, room 501.
Man: OK. When is breakfast time?
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Seu quarto fica no 5º andar, quarto 501.
Homem: OK. Quando é a hora do café da manhã?

#######

Woman: Your room is on the 5th floor, room 501.
Man: OK. When is breakfast time?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: आपका कमरा 5वीं मंजिल पर है, कमरा नंबर 501।
आदमी: ठीक है. नाश्ते का समय कब है?

#######

Woman: Your room is on the 5th floor, room 501.
Man: OK. When is breakfast time?

Adam: Tamam. Kahvaltı zamanı ne zaman?

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 저 여기 산책하러 자주 오는데 참 좋지요? 
여자: 네. 나무도 많고 넓어서 좋네요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi thường xuyên tới đây để đi dạo, chỗ này rất ổn đúng không? 
Nữ: Vâng. Ở đây có nhiều cây và rất rộng nữa nên rất ổn luôn.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: I often come here to take a walk, isn't it great?
Woman: Yes, it's good. There are many trees here and it's spacious.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Je viens souvent ici pour me promener, n'est-ce pas génial ?
Femme : Oui, c'est bon. Il y a beaucoup d'arbres ici et c'est spacieux.

#######

Man: I often come here to take a walk, isn't it great?
Woman: Yes, it's good. There are many trees here and it's spacious.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: A menudo vengo aquí a dar un paseo, ¿no es genial?
Mujer: Sí, es bueno. Hay muchos árboles aquí y es espacioso.

#######

Man: I often come here to take a walk, isn't it great?
Woman: Yes, it's good. There are many trees here and it's spacious.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Saya sering datang ke sini untuk berjalan-jalan, bukankah itu bagus?
Wanita: Ya, itu bagus. Ada banyak pohon di sini dan luas.

#######

Man: I often come here to take a walk, isn't it great?
Woman: Yes, it's good. There are many trees here and it's spacious.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：よくここに散歩に来ますよね。
女：はい、いいです。ここは木々が多く、広々としています。

#######

Man: I often come here to take a walk, isn't it great?
Woman: Yes, it's good. There are many trees here and it's spacious.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Ich komme oft her, um spazieren zu gehen, ist das nicht toll?
Frau: Ja, es ist gut. Hier gibt es viele Bäume und es ist geräumig.

#######

Man: I often come here to take a walk, isn't it great?
Woman: Yes, it's good. There are many trees here and it's spacious.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：我经常来这里散步，不是很好吗？
女：是的，很好。这里有很多树，很宽敞。

general.g_text_audio:

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: (문을 열고 닫는 소리) 늦어서 죄송합니다.
여자: 빨리 앉으세요. 그럼, 이제 수업을 시작합시다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: (Tiếng đóng cửa) Em xin lỗi vì tới muộn.
Nữ: Mau về chỗ đi. Vậy chúng ta bắt đầu buổi học nhé.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: (Sound of opening and closing the door) I'm sorry for being late.
Woman: Sit down quickly. So, let's start the class now.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : (Bruit d'ouverture et de fermeture de la porte) Je suis désolé d'être en retard.
Femme : Asseyez-vous rapidement. Alors, commençons la classe maintenant.

#######

Man: (Sound of opening and closing the door) I'm sorry for being late.
Woman: Sit down quickly. So, let's start the class now.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: (Sonido de abrir y cerrar la puerta) Siento llegar tarde.
Mujer: Siéntate rápido. Entonces, comencemos la clase ahora.

#######

Man: (Sound of opening and closing the door) I'm sorry for being late.
Woman: Sit down quickly. So, let's start the class now.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: (Suara membuka dan menutup pintu) Saya minta maaf karena terlambat.
Wanita: Duduklah dengan cepat. Jadi, mari kita mulai kelasnya sekarang.

#######

Man: (Sound of opening and closing the door) I'm sorry for being late.
Woman: Sit down quickly. So, let's start the class now.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: (ドアの開閉音) 遅くなってすみません。
女性:すぐに座ってください。それでは、さっそく授業を始めましょう。

#######

Man: (Sound of opening and closing the door) I'm sorry for being late.
Woman: Sit down quickly. So, let's start the class now.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: (Geräusch des Öffnens und Schließens der Tür) Es tut mir leid, dass ich zu spät komme.
Frau: Setz dich schnell hin. Beginnen wir also jetzt mit dem Unterricht.

#######

Man: (Sound of opening and closing the door) I'm sorry for being late.
Woman: Sit down quickly. So, let's start the class now.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：（开门关门的声音）不好意思迟到了。
女：快坐下。那么，让我们现在开始上课吧。

#######

Man: (Sound of opening and closing the door) I'm sorry for being late.
Woman: Sit down quickly. So, let's start the class now.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：（開門關門的聲音）不好意思遲到了。
女：快坐下。那麼，讓我們現在開始上課吧。

#######

Man: (Sound of opening and closing the door) I'm sorry for being late.
Woman: Sit down quickly. So, let's start the class now.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: (Rumore di apertura e chiusura della porta) Mi dispiace per il ritardo.
Donna: Siediti presto. Quindi, iniziamo la lezione ora.

#######

Man: (Sound of opening and closing the door) I'm sorry for being late.
Woman: Sit down quickly. So, let's start the class now.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: (Звук открывающейся и закрывающейся двери) Простите, что опоздал.
Женщина: Садись быстро. Итак, давайте начнем урок сейчас.

#######

Man: (Sound of opening and closing the door) I'm sorry for being late.
Woman: Sit down quickly. So, let's start the class now.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: (เสียงเปิดปิดประตู) ขอโทษที่มาสายนะครับ
ผู้หญิง: นั่งลงเร็ว ๆ นี้ เอาล่ะ เรามาเริ่มชั้นเรียนกันเลย

#######

Man: (Sound of opening and closing the door) I'm sorry for being late.
Woman: Sit down quickly. So, let's start the class now.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: (Som de abertura e fechamento da porta) Me desculpe pelo atraso.
Mulher: Sente-se rapidamente. Então, vamos começar a aula agora.

#######

Man: (Sound of opening and closing the door) I'm sorry for being late.
Woman: Sit down quickly. So, let's start the class now.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: (दरवाजा खोलने और बंद करने की आवाज) देर से आने के लिए मुझे खेद है।

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 책은 몇 권까지 빌릴 수 있습니까?
여자: 다섯 권까지요. 빌려 가신 책은 일주일 안에 다시 가져 오세요.
남자: 네, 알겠습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Em có thể mượn mấy cuốn sách ạ?
Nữ: Năm cuốn nha. Sách mượn phải được trả trong vòng một tuần.
Nam: Vâng, em biết rồi ạ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Combien de livres puis-je emprunter ?
Femme : Jusqu'à cinq livres. Merci de rapporter le livre emprunté dans la semaine.
Homme : Oui, je vois.

#######

Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Cuántos libros puedo tomar prestados?
Mujer: Hasta cinco libros. Por favor devuelva el libro prestado dentro de una semana.
Hombre: Sí, ya veo.

#######

Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Berapa banyak buku yang bisa saya pinjam?
Wanita: Hingga lima buku. Harap membawa kembali buku yang dipinjam dalam waktu seminggu.
Pria: Ya, saya mengerti.

#######

Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：本は何冊借りられますか。
女性：5冊まで。借りた本は一週間以内に返してください。
男: はい、わかりました。

#######

Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Wie viele Bücher kann ich ausleihen?
Frau: Bis zu fünf Bücher. Bitte bringen Sie das ausgeliehene Buch innerhalb einer Woche zurück.
Mann: Ja, ich verstehe.

#######

Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：我可以借多少本书？
女人：最多五本书。请在一周内把借来的书还回来。
男：是的，我明白了。

#######

Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：我可以藉多少本書？
女人：最多五本書。請在一周內把借來的書還回來。
男：是的，我明白了。

#######

Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Quanti libri posso prendere in prestito?
Donna: Fino a cinque libri. Si prega di restituire il libro preso in prestito entro una settimana.
Uomo: Sì, capisco.

#######

Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Сколько книг я могу одолжить?
Женщина: До пяти книг. Пожалуйста, верните взятую напрокат книгу в течение недели.
Мужчина: Да, я вижу.

#######

Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ฉันสามารถยืมหนังสือได้กี่เล่ม?
ผู้หญิง: มากถึงห้าเล่ม กรุณานำหนังสือที่ยืมมากลับมาภายในหนึ่งสัปดาห์
ผู้ชาย: ใช่ฉันเห็นแล้ว

#######

Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Quantos livros posso pegar emprestado?
Mulher: Até cinco livros. Por favor, traga de volta o livro emprestado dentro de uma semana.
Homem: Sim, entendo.

#######

Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: मैं कितनी किताबें उधार ले सकता हूँ?
महिला: पाँच किताबें तक। कृपया उधार ली गई पुस्तक एक सप्ताह के भीतर वापस लाएँ।
आदमी: हाँ, मैं देखता हूँ।

#######

Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Kaç kitap ödünç alabilirim?
Kadın: En fazla beş kitap. Lütfen ödünç aldığınız kitabı bir hafta içinde geri getiriniz.
Adam: Evet, anlıyorum.

#######

Man: How many books can I borrow?
Woman: Up to five books. Please bring back the borrowed book within a week.
Man: Yes, I see.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 저, 돈도 바꾸고 통장도 하나 만들고 싶은데 어디로 가야 합니까?
여자: 제가 도와 드리겠습니다. 이쪽으로 오십시오.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Chị ơi, tôi muốn đổi tiền và mở một tài khoản ngân hàng, tôi phải đi đâu?
Nữ: Tôi sẽ giúp anh. Mời anh đi hướng này.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Eh bien, je veux échanger de l'argent et ouvrir un compte bancaire, où dois-je aller ?
Femme : Laisse-moi t'aider. Viens par là s'il te plait.

#######

Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Bueno, quiero cambiar dinero y abrir una cuenta bancaria, ¿a dónde debo ir?
Mujer: Déjame ayudarte. Ven por aquí, por favor.

#######

Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Nah, saya ingin menukar uang dan membuka rekening bank, kemana saya harus pergi?
Wanita: Biarkan saya membantu Anda. Silakan lewat sini.

#######

Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：そうですね、両替して銀行口座を開設したいのですが、どこに行けばいいですか？
女：手伝いましょう。こっちに来てください。

#######

Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Nun, ich möchte Geld wechseln und ein Bankkonto eröffnen, wo soll ich hingehen?
Frau: Lassen Sie mich Ihnen helfen. Hier entlang bitte.

#######

Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：嗯，我想换钱，开个银行账户，我应该去哪里？
女：让我帮你。请这边走

#######

Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：嗯，我想換錢，開個銀行賬戶，我應該去哪裡？
女：讓我幫你。請這邊走

#######

Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Beh, voglio cambiare denaro e aprire un conto in banca, dove devo andare?
Donna: Lascia che ti aiuti. Vieni da questa parte, per favore.

#######

Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Ну, я хочу обменять деньги и открыть счет в банке, куда мне идти?
Женщина: Позвольте мне помочь вам. Пройдите сюда, пожалуйста.

#######

Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ชาย : คือผมอยากแลกเงินและเปิดบัญชีธนาคารต้องไปที่ไหนครับ?
ผู้หญิง : ให้ฉันช่วยคุณสิ เชิญมาทางนี้ครับ..

#######

Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Bom, quero trocar dinheiro e abrir uma conta no banco, para onde devo ir?
Mulher: Deixe-me ajudá-lo. Venha por aqui por favor.

#######

Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: ठीक है, मैं पैसे बदलना चाहता हूँ और बैंक खाता खोलना चाहता हूँ, मुझे कहाँ जाना चाहिए?
महिला: मुझे आपकी मदद करने दीजिये. कृपया इस रास्ते को आये।

#######

Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Peki, para bozdurup banka hesabı açmak istiyorum, nereye gitmeliyim?
Kadın: Dur sana yardım edeyim. Bu tarafa gelin lütfen.

#######

Man: Well, I want to exchange money and open a bank account, where should I go?
Woman: Let me help you. Come this way, please.

general.g_text_audio:

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: My head hurts a little and I also cough.
Man: Then take this after you eat.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 어제 방을 하나 예약했어요. 이름은 김민수입니다.
여자: 모두 두 분이시고, 삼 일 동안 계실 거지요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Hôm qua tôi đã đặt phòng rồi. Tên tôi là Kim Minsoo.
Nữ: Anh đi hai người, ở trong vòng ba ngày đúng không ạ?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: I booked a room yesterday. My name is Minsoo Kim.
Woman: There are two of you, and you will be here for three days, right?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : J'ai réservé une chambre hier. Je m'appelle Minso Kim.
Femme : Vous êtes deux, et vous serez ici pour trois jours, n'est-ce pas ?

#######

Man: I booked a room yesterday. My name is Minsoo Kim.
Woman: There are two of you, and you will be here for three days, right?
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Mujer: Ustedes son dos y estarán aquí por tres días, ¿verdad?

#######

Man: I booked a room yesterday. My name is Minsoo Kim.
Woman: There are two of you, and you will be here for three days, right?
g_text_audio_translate.id:

#######

Woman: There are two of you, and you will be here for three days, right?

女：2人で、3日間ここにいるよね？

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 시청역에 어떻게 가요?
남자: 다음 역에서 2호선으로 갈아타세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Làm thế nào để đến ga tòa thị chính vậy ạ?
Nam: Chị chuyển sang tuyến số 2 ở ga tiếp theo.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: How can I get to City Hall Station?
Man: Please change to line 2 at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Comment puis-je me rendre à la gare de l'hôtel de ville ?
Homme : Veuillez changer pour la ligne 2 à la station suivante.

#######

Woman: How can I get to City Hall Station?
Man: Please change to line 2 at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Cómo puedo llegar a la estación del Ayuntamiento?
Hombre: cambie a la línea 2 en la siguiente estación.

#######

Woman: How can I get to City Hall Station?
Man: Please change to line 2 at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Bagaimana saya bisa sampai ke Stasiun Balai Kota?
Pria: Silakan pindah ke jalur 2 di stasiun berikutnya.

#######

Woman: How can I get to City Hall Station?
Man: Please change to line 2 at the next station.

男：次の駅で2号線に乗り換えてください。

#######

Man: Please change to line 2 at the next station.

Mann: Bitte steigen Sie an der nächsten Station in die Linie 2 um.

#######

Man: Please change to line 2 at the next station.

男：请在下一站换乘2号线。

#######

Woman: How can I get to City Hall Station?
Man: Please change to line 2 at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Como posso chegar à Estação City Hall?
Homem: Por favor, mude para a linha 2 na próxima estação.

#######

Woman: How can I get to City Hall Station?
Man: Please change to line 2 at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:

#######

Woman: How can I get to City Hall Station?
Man: Please change to line 2 at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Belediye Binası İstasyonuna nasıl gidebilirim?
Adam: Lütfen bir sonraki istasyonda 2. hatta geçin.

#######

Woman: How can I get to City Hall Station?
Man: Please change to line 2 at the next station.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 비행기 출발 시간이에요.
남자: 빨리 탑시다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Đã đến giờ chuyến bay khởi hành rồi.
Nam: Lên nhanh thôi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: It's time for the flight to depart.
Man: Let's get on it quickly.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Il est temps pour le vol de partir.
Homme : Allons-y rapidement.

#######

Woman: It's time for the flight to depart.
Man: Let's get on it quickly.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Es hora de que salga el vuelo.
Hombre: Vamos a hacerlo rápido.

#######

Man: Let's get on it quickly.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Pria: Ayo cepat.

#######

Woman: It's time for the flight to depart.
Man: Let's get on it quickly.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：飛行機の出発時間です。
男: すぐに始めましょう。

#######

Woman: It's time for the flight to depart.
Man: Let's get on it quickly.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

Mann: Lassen Sie uns schnell darauf eingehen.

#######

Woman: It's time for the flight to depart.
Man: Let's get on it quickly.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:

男：让我们快点开始吧。

#######

Woman: It's time for the flight to depart.
Man: Let's get on it quickly.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:

男：讓我們快點開始吧。

#######

Woman: It's time for the flight to depart.
Man: Let's get on it quickly.

Uomo: Facciamo presto.

#######

Woman: It's time for the flight to depart.
Man: Let's get on it quickly.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

Мужчина: Давай побыстрее займемся этим.

#######

Woman: It's time for the flight to depart.
Man: Let's get on it quickly.

Man: Let's get on it quickly.

#######

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 박물관은 여기에서 내려요?
남자: 아니요, 다음 정류장에서 내리세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tôi muốn tới bảo tàng thì xuống ở đây phải không?
Nam: Không, chị xuống ở trạm sau nhé.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Si je veux aller au musée, je dois descendre ici, n'est-ce pas ?
Nam : Non, tu devrais descendre à la prochaine station.

#######

Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Si quiero ir al museo, tengo que bajarme aquí, ¿no?
Nam: No, deberías bajarte en la siguiente estación.

#######

Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Jika saya ingin pergi ke museum, saya harus turun di sini, kan?
Nam: Tidak, Anda harus turun di stasiun berikutnya.

#######

Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：美術館に行きたければ、ここで降りないといけないですよね？
Nam:いいえ、次の駅で降りるべきです。

#######

Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Wenn ich ins Museum will, muss ich hier aussteigen, oder?
Nam: Nein, Sie sollten an der nächsten Station aussteigen.

#######

Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：如果我想去博物馆，我必须在这里下车，对吧？
南：不，你应该在下一站下车。

#######

Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：如果我想去博物館，我必須在這裡下車，對吧？
南：不，你應該在下一站下車。

#######

Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Se voglio andare al museo, devo scendere qui, giusto?
Nam: No, dovresti scendere alla prossima stazione.

#######

Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Если я хочу пойти в музей, мне придется выйти здесь, верно?
Нам: Нет, тебе следует выйти на следующей станции.

#######

Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ถ้าฉันอยากไปพิพิธภัณฑ์ฉันต้องลงที่นี่ใช่ไหม?
น้ำ: ไม่ คุณควรลงสถานีถัดไปนะ

#######

Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Se eu quiser ir ao museu tenho que descer aqui, né?
Nam: Não, você deveria descer na próxima estação.

#######

Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: अगर मुझे संग्रहालय जाना है तो मुझे यहीं उतरना होगा, है ना?
नाम: नहीं, आपको अगले स्टेशन पर उतर जाना चाहिए।

#######

Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Müzeye gitmek istersem burada inmem lazım değil mi?
Nam: Hayır, bir sonraki istasyonda inmelisin.

#######

Woman: If I want to go to the museum, I have to get off here, right?
Nam: No, you should get off at the next station.

title: [11～14] 다음은 무엇에 대해 말하고 있습니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 이걸 한국 돈으로 바꿔 주세요.
남자: 네. 한국 돈으로 10만 원입니다. 모두 만 원짜리로 드릴까요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tôi muốn đổi chỗ này sang tiền Hàn Quốc.
Nam: Vâng. Chỗ này được 100 000 won. Cô lấy tất cả đều là tờ 10.000 won nhé?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Please exchange this for Korean money.
Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Veuillez échanger ceci contre de l'argent coréen.
Homme : Oui, c'est 100 000 won en argent coréen. Souhaitez-vous tous les billets de 10 000 won ?

#######

Woman: Please exchange this for Korean money.
Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Cambia esto por dinero coreano.
Hombre: Sí, son 100.000 wones en dinero coreano. ¿Quiere todos los billetes de 10.000 wones?

#######

Woman: Please exchange this for Korean money.
Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Tolong tukar ini dengan uang Korea.
Pria: Ya, itu 100.000 won dalam uang Korea. Apakah Anda ingin semua uang 10.000 won?

#######

Woman: Please exchange this for Korean money.
Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：これを韓国のお金に両替してください。
男: はい、韓国のお金で 10 万ウォンです。 1万ウォン札全部よろしいですか？

#######

Woman: Please exchange this for Korean money.
Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Tauschen Sie das bitte gegen koreanisches Geld um.
Mann: Ja, es sind 100.000 Won in koreanischem Geld. Möchten Sie alle 10.000 Won-Scheine?

#######

Woman: Please exchange this for Korean money.
Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：请用这个换韩国钱。
男：是的，100,000韩元韩币。你想要所有10,000韩元的钞票吗？

#######

Woman: Please exchange this for Korean money.
Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：請用這個換韓國錢。
男：是的，100,000韓元韓幣。你想要所有10,000韓元的鈔票嗎？

#######

Woman: Please exchange this for Korean money.
Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Per favore scambia questo con denaro coreano.
Uomo: Sì, sono 100.000 won in denaro coreano. Vorresti tutte le 10.000 banconote vinte?

#######

Woman: Please exchange this for Korean money.
Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Пожалуйста, обменяйте это на корейские деньги.
Мужчина: Да, это 100 000 вон в корейских деньгах. Хотите все купюры номиналом 10 000 вон?

#######

Woman: Please exchange this for Korean money.
Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: กรุณาแลกเปลี่ยนเป็นเงินเกาหลี
ผู้ชาย: ใช่ครับ เป็นเงินเกาหลี 100,000 วอน คุณต้องการแบงค์ 10,000 วอนทั้งหมดไหม?

#######

Woman: Please exchange this for Korean money.
Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Por favor, troque isso por dinheiro coreano.
Homem: Sim, são 100.000 won em dinheiro coreano. Você gostaria de todas as notas de 10.000 won?

#######

Woman: Please exchange this for Korean money.
Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: कृपया इसे कोरियाई पैसे से बदल लें।
आदमी: हाँ, कोरियाई मुद्रा में यह 100,000 वॉन है। क्या आप जीते गए सभी 10,000 बिल चाहेंगे?

#######

Woman: Please exchange this for Korean money.
Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Lütfen bunu Kore parasıyla değiştirin.
Adam: Evet, Kore parasıyla 100.000 won. 10.000 won'luk banknotların hepsini ister misiniz?

#######

Man: Yes, it's 100,000 won in Korean money. Would you like all 10,000 won bills?

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 남자 옷은 어디에 있어요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Femme : Veuillez monter au troisième étage.

Woman: Please go up to the third floor.

Woman: Please go up to the third floor.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

Женщина: Пожалуйста, поднимитесь на третий этаж.

महिला: कृपया तीसरी मंजिल तक चलें।

Woman: Please go up to the third floor.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Erkek kıyafetleri nerede?
Kadın: Lütfen üçüncü kata çıkın.

#######

Woman: Please go up to the third floor.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 수업을 시작하겠습니다.
남자: 네, 선생님.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Let's start the class.
Man: Yes, teacher.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Homme : Oui, professeur.

#######

Woman: Let's start the class.
Man: Yes, teacher.

Hombre: Sí, maestro.

#######

Man: Yes, teacher.

Man: Yes, teacher.

男：はい、先生。

#######

Man: Yes, teacher.

Mann: Ja, Lehrer.

#######

Man: Yes, teacher.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 강수미입니다. 방을 예약했는데요.
남자: 강수미 씨요? 잠깐만요. 205호입니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tôi là Kang Sumi. Tôi đã đặt phòng trước rồi.
Nam: Chị Kang Sumi ạ? Chị đợi một lát. Của chị là phòng 205.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I'm Kang Sumi. I booked a room.
Man: Kang Sumi? Please wait a minute. Yours is room 205.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Je suis Kang Sumi. J'ai réservé une chambre.
Homme : Kang Sumi ? Attends une minute s'il-te-plaît. La vôtre est la chambre 205.

#######

Woman: I'm Kang Sumi. I booked a room.
Man: Kang Sumi? Please wait a minute. Yours is room 205.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Soy Kang Sumi. Reservé una habitación.
Hombre: ¿Kang Sumi? Por favor, espere un minuto. La tuya es la habitación 205.

#######

Woman: I'm Kang Sumi. I booked a room.
Man: Kang Sumi? Please wait a minute. Yours is room 205.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Pria: Kang Sumi? Mohon tunggu sebentar. Kamarmu adalah kamar 205.

#######

Woman: I'm Kang Sumi. I booked a room.
Man: Kang Sumi? Please wait a minute. Yours is room 205.

남자: 이쪽에 있습니다.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 아주머니, 사과 맛있어요?
여자: 아주 맛있어요. (의향을 묻는 억양으로) 몇 개 드릴까요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Cô ơi, táo này có ngon không?
Nữ: Ngon lắm. (Giọng hỏi ý định) Cháu mua mấy quả?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Ma tante, la pomme est-elle savoureuse ?
Femme : C'est très bon. (Avec un accent demandant l'intention) Combien en voudriez-vous ?

#######

Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Tía, ¿la manzana está rica?
Mujer: Es muy sabroso. (Con acento preguntando por la intención) ¿Cuántos te gustarían?

#######

Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Bibi, apakah apel itu enak?
Wanita: Ini sangat enak. (Dengan aksen meminta niat) Berapa banyak yang Anda inginkan?

#######

Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：おばさん、りんごはおいしい？
女：とてもおいしいです。 (意図を求める訛りで) 何個ご希望ですか？

#######

Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Tante, schmeckt der Apfel?
Frau: Es ist sehr lecker. (Mit einem Akzent, der nach Absicht fragt) Wie viele möchten Sie?

#######

Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：阿姨，苹果好吃吗？
女：很好吃。 （带着询问意图的口音）你想要几个？

#######

Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：阿姨，蘋果好吃嗎？
女：很好吃。 （帶著詢問意圖的口音）你想要幾個？

#######

Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Zia, la mela è gustosa?
Donna: È molto gustoso. (Con un accento che chiede l'intenzione) Quanti ne vorresti?

#######

Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Тётя, а яблоко вкусное?
Женщина: Это очень вкусно. (с акцентом, спрашивающим о намерении) Сколько бы вы хотели?

#######

Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย : ป้าครับ แอปเปิ้ลอร่อยมั้ย?
ผู้หญิง: มันอร่อยมาก. (พร้อมสำเนียงถามเจตนา) รับกี่อันคะ?

#######

Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Tia, a maçã está gostosa?
Mulher: Está muito gostoso. (Com sotaque pedindo intenção) Quantos você gostaria?

#######

Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: आंटी, क्या सेब स्वादिष्ट है?
महिला: यह बहुत स्वादिष्ट है. (इरादा पूछते हुए लहजे में) आप कितने चाहेंगे?

#######

Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Teyze, elma lezzetli mi?
Kadın: Çok lezzetli. (Niyet isteyen bir aksanla) Kaç tane istersiniz?

#######

Man: Auntie, is the apple tasty?
Woman: It's very tasty. (With an accent asking for intent) How many would you like?

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 아이들 책을 사러 왔는데 뭐가 좋아요?
여자: 이 동화책 어떠세요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi đến để mua sách cho trẻ em, cuốn nào thì hay nhỉ?

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: I came to buy children's books. Which one is good?

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 남자 옷은 몇 층에 있어요?
남자: 5층에 있어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Quần áo nam ở tầng mấy?
Nam: Ở tầng 5.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : À quel étage se trouvent les vêtements pour hommes ?
Homme : C'est au cinquième étage.

#######

Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿En qué piso está la ropa de los hombres?
Hombre: Está en el quinto piso.

#######

Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Di lantai berapa pakaian pria?
Pria: Itu di lantai lima.

#######

Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：紳士服は何階にありますか。
男性：5階です。

#######

Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Auf welcher Etage sind die Herrenklamotten?
Mann: Es ist im fünften Stock.

#######

Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：男装在几楼？
男：在五楼。

#######

Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：男裝在幾樓？
男：在五樓。

#######

Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: A che piano sono i vestiti degli uomini?
Uomo: È al quinto piano.

#######

Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: На каком этаже мужская одежда?
Мужчина: Это на пятом этаже.

#######

Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: เสื้อผ้าผู้ชายอยู่ชั้นไหนคะ?
ผู้ชาย : อยู่ชั้น 5

#######

Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Em que andar estão as roupas masculinas?
Homem: Fica no quinto andar.

#######

Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: पुरुषों के कपड़े किस मंजिल पर हैं?
आदमी: यह पाँचवीं मंजिल पर है।

#######

Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Erkek kıyafetleri hangi katta?
Adam: Beşinci katta.

#######

Woman: What floor are the men's clothes on?
Man: It's on the fifth floor.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 시청역에 갈 거예요. 표를 어디에서 사요?
남자: 표는 여기에서 사세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi sẽ đến ga tòa thị chính. Tôi mua vé ở đâu?
Nữ: Hãy mua vé ở đây.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Je vais à la gare de la mairie. Où puis-je acheter mon billet ?
Homme : Veuillez acheter votre billet ici.

#######

Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Voy a la estación del ayuntamiento. ¿Dónde puedo comprar mi entrada?
Hombre: Por favor compre su boleto aquí.

#######

Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Saya akan pergi ke stasiun balai kota. Dimana saya bisa membeli tiket saya?
Pria: Silakan beli tiket Anda di sini.

#######

Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：市役所駅に行きます。チケットはどこで購入できますか?
男：ここで切符を買ってください。

#######

Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Ich gehe zum Rathausbahnhof. Wo kann ich mein Ticket kaufen?
Mann: Bitte kaufen Sie Ihr Ticket hier.

#######

Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：我要去市政厅站。我在哪里可以买到我的票？
男：请在这里买票。

#######

Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：我要去市政廳站。我在哪裡可以買到我的票？
男：請在這裡買票。

#######

Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Vado alla stazione del municipio. Dove posso acquistare il mio biglietto?
Uomo: Si prega di acquistare il biglietto qui.

#######

Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Я иду на вокзал мэрии. Где я могу купить билет?
Мужчина: Пожалуйста, купите билет здесь.

#######

Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ฉันจะไปสถานีศาลากลาง ฉันสามารถซื้อตั๋วได้ที่ไหน?
ผู้ชาย: กรุณาซื้อตั๋วของคุณที่นี่

#######

Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Vou para a estação da prefeitura. Onde posso comprar meu ingresso?
Homem: Por favor, compre seu ingresso aqui.

#######

Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मैं सिटी हॉल स्टेशन जा रही हूं। मैं अपना टिकट कहां से खरीद सकता हूं?
आदमी: कृपया अपना टिकट यहाँ खरीदें।

#######

Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Belediye binası istasyonuna gidiyorum. Biletimi nereden satın alabilirim?
Adam: Lütfen biletinizi buradan alın.

#######

Woman: I'm going to the city hall station. Where can I buy my ticket?
Man: Please buy your ticket here.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 돈을 바꾸러 왔습니다.
남자: 어느 나라 돈으로 바꾸세요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 손님, 뭘 드시겠어요?
여자: 커피 한 잔 주세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Quý khách uống gì ạ?
Nữ: Cho tôi một ly cà phê.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Madame, que voulez-vous boire ?
Femme : Une tasse de café, s'il vous plaît.

#######

Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Señora, ¿qué le gustaría beber?
Mujer: Una taza de café, por favor.

#######

Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Bu, apa yang ingin Anda minum?
Wanita: Secangkir kopi, silakan.

#######

Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：マダム、何を飲みたい？
女：コーヒーをお願いします。

#######

Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Frau, was möchten Sie trinken?
Frau: Eine Tasse Kaffee, bitte.

#######

Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：夫人，您想喝点什么？
女：请喝杯咖啡。

#######

Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：夫人，您想喝點什麼？
女：請喝杯咖啡。

#######

Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Signora, cosa vuole bere?
Donna: Una tazza di caffè, per favore.

#######

Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Мадам, что бы вы хотели выпить?
Женщина: Чашку кофе, пожалуйста.

#######

Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ชาย : มาดาม คุณจะดื่มอะไรครับ?
ผู้หญิง: กรุณาดื่มกาแฟสักแก้ว

#######

Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Senhora, o que você gostaria de beber?
Mulher: Uma xícara de café, por favor.

#######

Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: मैडम, आप क्या पीना चाहेंगी?
महिला: कृपया एक कप कॉफी।

#######

Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Hanımefendi, ne içmek istersiniz?
Kadın: Bir fincan kahve lütfen.

#######

Man: Madam, what would you like to drink?
Woman: A cup of coffee, please.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 어떻게 오셨습니까?
남자: 이 편지를 미국으로 보내고 싶어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tôi có thể giúp gì cho bạn?
Nam: Tôi muốn gửi bức thư này đến Mỹ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: How can I help you?
Man: I want to send this letter to America.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Comment puis-je vous aider ?
Homme : Je veux envoyer cette lettre en Amérique.

#######

Woman: How can I help you?
Man: I want to send this letter to America.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Cómo puedo ayudarte?
Hombre: Quiero enviar esta carta a América.

#######

Woman: How can I help you?
Man: I want to send this letter to America.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Bagaimana saya bisa membantu Anda?
Pria: Saya ingin mengirim surat ini ke Amerika.

#######

Woman: How can I help you?
Man: I want to send this letter to America.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：どうしたらいいですか？
男: この手紙をアメリカに送りたい.

#######

Woman: How can I help you?
Man: I want to send this letter to America.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Wie kann ich Ihnen helfen?
Mann: Ich möchte diesen Brief nach Amerika schicken.

#######

Woman: How can I help you?
Man: I want to send this letter to America.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：有什么可以帮你的吗？
男：我想把这封信寄到美国。

#######

Woman: How can I help you?
Man: I want to send this letter to America.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：有什麼可以幫你的嗎？
男：我想把這封信寄到美國。

#######

Woman: How can I help you?
Man: I want to send this letter to America.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Come posso aiutarti?
Uomo: Voglio inviare questa lettera in America.

#######

Woman: How can I help you?
Man: I want to send this letter to America.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Чем я могу вам помочь?
Мужчина: Я хочу отправить это письмо в Америку.

#######

Woman: How can I help you?
Man: I want to send this letter to America.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ฉันจะช่วยคุณได้อย่างไร?
ผู้ชาย: ฉันต้องการส่งจดหมายนี้ไปอเมริกา

#######

Woman: How can I help you?
Man: I want to send this letter to America.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Como posso te ajudar?
Homem: Quero enviar esta carta para a América.

#######

Woman: How can I help you?
Man: I want to send this letter to America.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मैं आपकी कैसे मदद कर सकती हूं?
आदमी: मैं यह पत्र अमेरिका भेजना चाहता हूं।

#######

Woman: How can I help you?
Man: I want to send this letter to America.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 책상하고 의자를 사러 왔는데요.
여자: 네. 이 책상은 어떠세요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi đến để mua bàn và ghế.
Nữ: Vâng. Anh thấy chiếc bàn này thế nào?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: I came to buy a desk and a chair.
Woman: Yes. How about this desk?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Je suis venu acheter un bureau et une chaise.
Femme : Oui. Et ce bureau ?

#######

Man: I came to buy a desk and a chair.
Woman: Yes. How about this desk?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Vine a comprar un escritorio y una silla.
Mujer: Sí. ¿Qué tal este escritorio?

#######

Man: I came to buy a desk and a chair.
Woman: Yes. How about this desk?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Saya datang untuk membeli meja dan kursi.
Wanita: Ya. Bagaimana dengan meja ini?

#######

Man: I came to buy a desk and a chair.
Woman: Yes. How about this desk?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：机と椅子を買いに来ました。
女性: はい。このデスクはどうですか？

#######

Man: I came to buy a desk and a chair.
Woman: Yes. How about this desk?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Ich bin gekommen, um einen Schreibtisch und einen Stuhl zu kaufen.
Frau: Ja. Wie wäre es mit diesem Schreibtisch?

#######

Man: I came to buy a desk and a chair.
Woman: Yes. How about this desk?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：我是来买桌子和椅子的。
女：是的。这张桌子怎么样？

#######

Man: I came to buy a desk and a chair.
Woman: Yes. How about this desk?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：我是來買桌子和椅子的。
女：是的。這張桌子怎麼樣？

#######

Man: I came to buy a desk and a chair.
Woman: Yes. How about this desk?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Sono venuto a comprare una scrivania e una sedia.
Donna: Sì. Che ne dici di questa scrivania?

#######

Man: I came to buy a desk and a chair.
Woman: Yes. How about this desk?
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Я пришел купить стол и стул.
Женщина: Да. Как насчет этого стола?

#######

Man: I came to buy a desk and a chair.
Woman: Yes. How about this desk?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ฉันมาซื้อโต๊ะและเก้าอี้
ผู้หญิง: ใช่. แล้วโต๊ะตัวนี้ล่ะ?

#######

Man: I came to buy a desk and a chair.
Woman: Yes. How about this desk?
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Vim comprar uma escrivaninha e uma cadeira.
Mulher: Sim. Que tal esta mesa?

#######

Man: I came to buy a desk and a chair.
Woman: Yes. How about this desk?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: मैं एक मेज और एक कुर्सी खरीदने आया हूँ।
महिला: हाँ. इस डेस्क के बारे में क्या ख्याल है?

#######

Man: I came to buy a desk and a chair.
Woman: Yes. How about this desk?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Masa ve sandalye almaya geldim.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 선생님, 오늘 숙제 있어요?
여자: 아니요, 오늘은 숙제가 없어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Thưa cô, hôm nay có bài tập không ạ?
Nữ: Không, hôm nay không có bài tập.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Teacher, do we have homework today?
Woman: No. There is no homework today.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Professeur, avons-nous des devoirs aujourd'hui ?
Femme : Non. Il n'y a pas de devoirs aujourd'hui.

#######

Man: Teacher, do we have homework today?
Woman: No. There is no homework today.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Mujer: No. Hoy no hay tarea.

Woman: No. There is no homework today.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Guru, apakah kita memiliki pekerjaan rumah hari ini?
Wanita: Tidak. Tidak ada pekerjaan rumah hari ini.

#######

Man: Teacher, do we have homework today?
Woman: No. There is no homework today.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

Woman: No. There is no homework today.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

Woman: No. There is no homework today.

女人：沒有。今天沒有作業。

#######

Woman: No. There is no homework today.

Donna: No. Non ci sono compiti oggi.

Woman: No. There is no homework today.

Woman: No. There is no homework today.

महिला: नहीं, आज कोई होमवर्क नहीं है.

general.g_text_audio:

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: How many days can I borrow this book?
Man: A week.

Homme : Une semaine.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 실례합니다. 명동에 어떻게 가요?
남자: 여기에서 백 번 버스를 타세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Xin thứ lỗi. Đến Myeongdong thì đi như thế nào ạ?
Nam: Chị hãy bắt xe buýt số 100 ở đây.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Excuse me. How do I get to Myeong-dong?
Man: Take bus number one hundred from here.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Excusez-moi. Comment se rendre à Myeong-dong ?
Homme : Prenez le bus numéro 100 à partir d'ici.

#######

Woman: Excuse me. How do I get to Myeong-dong?
Man: Take bus number one hundred from here.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Hombre: Tome el autobús número cien desde aquí.

#######

Woman: Excuse me. How do I get to Myeong-dong?
Man: Take bus number one hundred from here.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Permisi. Bagaimana cara menuju Myeong-dong?
Pria: Naik bus nomor seratus dari sini.

#######

Woman: Excuse me. How do I get to Myeong-dong?
Man: Take bus number one hundred from here.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

Man: Take bus number one hundred from here.

男：從這裡坐一百路公交車。

Man: Take bus number one hundred from here.

Man: Take bus number one hundred from here.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 어떻게 오셨어요?
여자: 목이 아프고 열이 나요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What brings you here?
Woman: I have a sore throat and a fever.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Qu'est-ce qui vous amène ici ?
Femme : J'ai mal à la gorge et de la fièvre.

#######

Man: What brings you here?
Woman: I have a sore throat and a fever.

Wanita: Saya sakit tenggorokan dan demam.

g_text_audio_translate.ja:

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 무슨 영화를 볼까요?
여자: 저 영화 어때요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Xem phim gì bây giờ nhỉ?
Nữ: Phim đó thì sao?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Quel film allons-nous regarder ?
Femme : Et ce film ?

#######

Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Qué película vamos a ver?
Mujer: ¿Qué tal esa película?

#######

Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Film apa yang akan kita tonton?
Wanita: Bagaimana dengan film itu?

#######

Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：どの映画を見ましょうか？
女：あの映画はどう？

#######

Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Welchen Film sollen wir uns ansehen?
Frau: Wie wäre es mit diesem Film?

#######

Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：我们看什么电影？
女：那部电影怎么样？

#######

Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：我們看什麼電影？
女：那部電影怎麼樣？

#######

Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Che film guardiamo?
Donna: Che ne dici di quel film?

#######

Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Какой фильм нам посмотреть?
Женщина: А как насчет этого фильма?

#######

Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: เราจะดูหนังเรื่องอะไรดี?
ผู้หญิง: แล้วหนังเรื่องนั้นล่ะ?

#######

Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Que filme devemos assistir?
Mulher: Que tal aquele filme?

#######

Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: हम कौन सी फिल्म देखेंगे?
महिला: उस फिल्म के बारे में क्या ख्याल है?

#######

Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Hangi filmi izleyelim?
Kadın: Peki ya şu film?

#######

Man: What movie shall we watch?
Woman: How about that movie?

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 머리를 어떻게 해 드릴까요?
남자: 짧게 잘라 주세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Anh muốn làm tóc kiểu gì ạ?
Nam: Chị cắt ngắn cho tôi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: How would you like your hair done?
Man: Cut it short, please.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Comment aimeriez-vous que vos cheveux soient coiffés ?
Homme : Coupez court, s'il vous plaît.

#######

Woman: How would you like your hair done?
Man: Cut it short, please.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Cómo te gustaría que te peinaran?
Hombre: Abrígate, por favor.

#######

Woman: How would you like your hair done?
Man: Cut it short, please.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Bagaimana Anda ingin rambut Anda ditata?
Pria: Tolong potong pendek.

#######

Woman: How would you like your hair done?
Man: Cut it short, please.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：髪型はどうしますか？
男: 短くしてください。

#######

Woman: How would you like your hair done?
Man: Cut it short, please.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

Mann: Mach es bitte kurz.

#######

Woman: How would you like your hair done?
Man: Cut it short, please.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:

男：请短一点。

Woman: How would you like your hair done?
Man: Cut it short, please.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:

男：請短一點。

Woman: How would you like your hair done?
Man: Cut it short, please.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

Uomo: Taglia corto, per favore.

Man: Cut it short, please.

Man: Cut it short, please.

Man: Cut it short, please.

आदमी: कृपया इसे छोटा करें।

Man: Cut it short, please.

Adam: Kısa kes lütfen.

Man: Cut it short, please.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 실례지만, 서울에서 오는 비행기는 언제 도착합니까?
여자: 세 시 사십 분에 옵니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Xin lỗi, chuyến bay đến từ Seoul bao giờ sẽ tới nơi ạ?
Nữ: 3 giờ 40 phút sẽ tới ạ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Excusez-moi, quand arrivera le vol de Séoul ?
Femme : Il arrivera à 3h40.

#######

Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Disculpe, ¿cuándo llegará el vuelo de Seúl?
Mujer: Llegará a las 3:40.

#######

Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Permisi, kapan penerbangan dari Seoul akan tiba?
Wanita: Ini akan tiba pukul 3:40.

#######

Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: すみません、ソウル発の飛行機はいつ着きますか?
女：3時40分に着きます。

#######

Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Entschuldigung, wann kommt der Flug aus Seoul an?
Frau: Es wird um 3:40 Uhr ankommen.

#######

Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：请问，首尔的航班什么时候到？
女：3点40分到。

#######

Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：請問，首爾的航班什麼時候到？
女：3點40分到。

#######

Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Mi scusi, quando arriverà il volo da Seoul?
Donna: Arriverà alle 3:40.

#######

Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Простите, когда прибудет рейс из Сеула?
Женщина: Он прибудет в 3:40.

#######

Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย : ขอโทษครับ ไฟลท์จากโซลจะมาถึงเมื่อไหร่ครับ?
ผู้หญิง: จะมาถึงตอน 3:40 น.

#######

Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Com licença, quando chegará o vôo de Seul?
Mulher: Chegará às 15h40.

#######

Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: माफ कीजिए, सियोल से फ्लाइट कब आएगी?
महिला: 3:40 बजे पहुंचेगी.

#######

Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Affedersiniz, Seul'den kalkan uçak ne zaman gelecek?
Kadın: 3.40'ta gelecek.

#######

Man: Excuse me, when will the flight from Seoul arrive?
Woman: It will arrive at 3:40.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Man: Madam, can I have some more kimchi?
Woman: Yes, wait a minute.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

#######

Woman: Yes, wait a minute.

Mujer: Sí, espera un minuto.

Woman: Yes, wait a minute.

Wanita: Ya, tunggu sebentar.

Woman: Yes, wait a minute.

#######

Woman: Yes, wait a minute.

#######

#######

Man: Madam, can I have some more kimchi?
Woman: Yes, wait a minute.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:

女：是的，等一下。

#######

Man: Madam, can I have some more kimchi?
Woman: Yes, wait a minute.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

Donna: Sì, aspetta un minuto.

#######

Man: Madam, can I have some more kimchi?
Woman: Yes, wait a minute.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

Женщина: Да, подожди минутку.

Woman: Yes, wait a minute.

Woman: Yes, wait a minute.

Mulher: Sim, espere um minuto.

#######

Man: Madam, can I have some more kimchi?
Woman: Yes, wait a minute.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 여자 구두는 몇층에 있어요?
남자: 2층에 있습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Giày nữ ở tầng mấy vậy?
Nam: Ở tầng 2.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: What floor are the women's shoes on?
Man: It's on the second floor.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : À quel étage se trouvent les chaussures pour femmes ?
Homme : C'est au deuxième étage.

#######

Woman: What floor are the women's shoes on?
Man: It's on the second floor.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Hombre: Está en el segundo piso.

#######

Woman: What floor are the women's shoes on?
Man: It's on the second floor.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Pria: Itu di lantai dua.

#######

Woman: What floor are the women's shoes on?
Man: It's on the second floor.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

男：二階です。

#######

Woman: What floor are the women's shoes on?
Man: It's on the second floor.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

Mann: Es ist im zweiten Stock.

#######

Woman: What floor are the women's shoes on?
Man: It's on the second floor.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：女鞋在几楼？
男：在二楼。

#######

Woman: What floor are the women's shoes on?
Man: It's on the second floor.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：女鞋在幾樓？
男：在二樓。

Man: It's on the second floor.

Uomo: È al secondo piano.

#######

Man: It's on the second floor.

Man: It's on the second floor.

Man: It's on the second floor.

general.g_text_audio:
