title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 실례합니다. 이 책들을 빌리고 싶은데요.
여자: 학생증 보여 주세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Xin thất lễ. Em muốn mượn những cuốn sách này ạ.
Nữ: Cho tôi xem thẻ học sinh.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Excuse me. I'd like to borrow these books.
Woman: Show me your student ID.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Scusami. Vorrei prendere in prestito questi libri.
Donna: Mostrami la tua tessera studentesca.

#######

Man: Excuse me. I'd like to borrow these books.
Woman: Show me your student ID.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Excusez-moi. J'aimerais emprunter ces livres.
Femme : Montre-moi ta carte d'étudiant.

#######

Man: Excuse me. I'd like to borrow these books.
Woman: Show me your student ID.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Mujer: Muéstrame tu identificación de estudiante.

#######

Man: Excuse me. I'd like to borrow these books.
Woman: Show me your student ID.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Wanita: Tunjukkan padaku kartu pelajarmu.

#######

Man: Excuse me. I'd like to borrow these books.
Woman: Show me your student ID.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

女性: 学生証を見せてください。

#######

Man: Excuse me. I'd like to borrow these books.
Woman: Show me your student ID.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

Frau: Zeigen Sie mir Ihren Studentenausweis.

#######

Man: Excuse me. I'd like to borrow these books.
Woman: Show me your student ID.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:

女：出示你的学生证。

g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:

女：出示你的學生證。

#######

Man: Excuse me. I'd like to borrow these books.
Woman: Show me your student ID.

#######

Man: Excuse me. I'd like to borrow these books.
Woman: Show me your student ID.

Man: Excuse me. I'd like to borrow these books.
Woman: Show me your student ID.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:

Mulher: Mostre-me sua carteira de estudante.

#######

Man: Excuse me. I'd like to borrow these books.
Woman: Show me your student ID.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:

महिला: मुझे अपना छात्र आईडी दिखाओ।

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 어서 오세요, 손님. 뭐 찾으세요? 
남자: 여기에 책상과 의자가 있어요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Quý khách, xin mời vào. Quý khách tìm gì ạ?
Nam: Ở đây có bàn học và ghế không?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Welcome, sir. What are you looking for?
Man: Are there desks and chairs here?
g_text_audio_translate.it:

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 지금 편지를 보내면 내일까지 도착할 수 있을까요? 
남자: 너무 늦어서 못 도착할 것 같습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Nếu bây giờ tôi gửi thư thì ngày mai có đến nơi được không?
Nam: Muộn quá rồi nên chắc không thể đến được đâu ạ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Man: It's too late to make it.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Se mando la lettera adesso, arriverà domani?
Uomo: È troppo tardi per farcela.

#######

Woman: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Man: It's too late to make it.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Si j'envoie la lettre maintenant, est-ce qu'elle arrivera demain ?
Homme : Il est trop tard pour y arriver.

#######

Woman: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Man: It's too late to make it.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Si envío la carta ahora, ¿llegará mañana?
Hombre: Es demasiado tarde para hacerlo.

#######

Woman: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Man: It's too late to make it.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Jika saya mengirim surat sekarang, apakah besok akan sampai?
Pria: Sudah terlambat untuk melakukannya.

#######

Woman: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Man: It's too late to make it.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: 今手紙を出したら、明日までに届きますか?
男性: もう手遅れだよ。

#######

Woman: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Man: It's too late to make it.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Wenn ich den Brief jetzt absende, kommt er dann morgen an?
Mann: Es ist zu spät, es zu schaffen.

#######

Woman: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Man: It's too late to make it.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：如果我现在寄信，明天会收到吗？
男：现在来不及了。

#######

Woman: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Man: It's too late to make it.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：如果我現在寄信，明天會收到嗎？
男：現在來不及了。

#######

Woman: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Man: It's too late to make it.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Если я отправлю письмо сейчас, оно придет завтра?
Мужчина: Слишком поздно это делать.

#######

Woman: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Man: It's too late to make it.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ถ้าฉันส่งจดหมายตอนนี้ พรุ่งนี้จะมาถึงไหม?
ผู้ชาย: มันสายเกินไปที่จะทำมัน

#######

Woman: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Man: It's too late to make it.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Se eu mandar a carta agora, ela chega amanhã?
Homem: É tarde demais para fazer isso.

#######

Woman: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Man: It's too late to make it.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
स्त्री-अभी पत्र भेज दूं तो क्या कल तक आ जायेगा?
आदमी: इसे बनाने में बहुत देर हो चुकी है।

#######

Woman: If I send the letter now, will it arrive by tomorrow?
Man: It's too late to make it.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Mektubu şimdi göndersem yarına kadar gelir mi?
Adam: Bunu yapmak için çok geç.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 어디가 아프세요?
남자: 어제 밤부터 열이 나고 기침을 해요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Anh bị đau ở đâu sao?
Nam: Tôi bị sốt và ho từ đêm hôm qua.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Are you sick?
Man: I have had a fever and cough since last night.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: sei malato?
Uomo: Ho la febbre e la tosse da ieri sera.

#######

Woman: Are you sick?
Man: I have had a fever and cough since last night.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Es-tu malade ?
Homme : J'ai de la fièvre et de la toux depuis hier soir.

#######

Woman: Are you sick?
Man: I have had a fever and cough since last night.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Hombre: Tengo fiebre y tos desde anoche.

#######

Woman: Are you sick?
Man: I have had a fever and cough since last night.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Pria : Saya menderita demam dan batuk sejak tadi malam.

#######

Woman: Are you sick?
Man: I have had a fever and cough since last night.

男性: 昨夜から熱と咳が出ています。

#######

Man: I have had a fever and cough since last night.

#######

Man: I have had a fever and cough since last night.

g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:

#######

Woman: Are you sick?
Man: I have had a fever and cough since last night.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Ты заболел?
Мужчина: Со вчерашнего вечера у меня жар и кашель.

#######

Woman: Are you sick?
Man: I have had a fever and cough since last night.

ผู้ชาย: ฉันมีไข้และไอตั้งแต่เมื่อคืน

Man: I have had a fever and cough since last night.

Homem: Estou com febre e tosse desde ontem à noite.

#######

Woman: Are you sick?
Man: I have had a fever and cough since last night.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:

Man: I have had a fever and cough since last night.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:

Woman: Are you sick?
Man: I have had a fever and cough since last night.

general.g_text_audio:

女：好的，我給你拍一張漂亮的照片。

Woman: Yes, I'll take a pretty picture for you.

general.g_text_audio:

남자: 네, 좋아요.

Man: Yes, fine.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 여기 삼계탕은 가장 맛있습니다.
남자: 그럼 삼계탕을 먹어 봐야겠어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nam: Vậy thì tôi phải ăn thử mới được.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Samgyetang here is the best.
Man: Then I should try the samgyetang.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Samgyetang qui è il migliore.
Uomo: Allora dovrei provare il samgyetang.

#######

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 거기서 옷과 신발을 자주 사요. 가격도 싸고 품질도 좋아요.
여자: 그래요? 저도 한 번 가고 싶어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi thường xuyên mua quần áo và giày ở đó. Giá rẻ mà chất lượng cũng tốt nữa.
Nữ: Vậy sao? Tôi cũng muốn thử đi một lần.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: I often buy clothes and shoes there. The price is cheap and the quality is good.
Woman: Is it? I also want to go once.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Spesso compro vestiti e scarpe lì. Il prezzo è economico e la qualità è buona.
Donna: Davvero? Anch'io voglio andarci una volta.

#######

Man: I often buy clothes and shoes there. The price is cheap and the quality is good.
Woman: Is it? I also want to go once.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : J'y achète souvent des vêtements et des chaussures. Le prix est bon marché et la qualité est bonne.
Femme : Vraiment ? Je veux aussi y aller une fois.

#######

Man: I often buy clothes and shoes there. The price is cheap and the quality is good.
Woman: Is it? I also want to go once.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: A menudo compro ropa y zapatos allí. El precio es barato y la calidad es buena.
Mujer: ¿Lo es? Yo también quiero ir una vez.

#######

Man: I often buy clothes and shoes there. The price is cheap and the quality is good.
Woman: Is it? I also want to go once.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Saya sering membeli baju dan sepatu di sana. Harganya murah dan kualitasnya bagus.
Wanita: Apakah itu? Saya juga ingin pergi sekali.

#######

Man: I often buy clothes and shoes there. The price is cheap and the quality is good.
Woman: Is it? I also want to go once.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: よくそこで服や靴を買います。価格も安く、品質も良いです。
女性：そうですか？私も一度行ってみたいです。

#######

Man: I often buy clothes and shoes there. The price is cheap and the quality is good.
Woman: Is it? I also want to go once.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

Frau: Ist es? Ich möchte auch einmal hingehen.

#######

Man: I often buy clothes and shoes there. The price is cheap and the quality is good.
Woman: Is it? I also want to go once.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 어머 수미 씨, 수미 씨도 여기에 있어요? 
여자: 네, 새 학기가 곧 시작하니까 책과 펜과 공책을 사러 가요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Ôi Sumi, Sumi cũng ở đây sao?
Nữ: Vâng, học kỳ mới sắp bắt đầu rồi nên tớ đi mua sách, bút và vở.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Oh Sumi, are you here too?
Woman: Yes, I'm going to buy books, pens, and notebooks because the new semester starts soon.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Oh Sumi, sei qui anche tu?
Donna: Sì, comprerò libri, penne e quaderni perché tra poco inizia il nuovo semestre.

#######

Man: Oh Sumi, are you here too?
Woman: Yes, I'm going to buy books, pens, and notebooks because the new semester starts soon.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Oh Sumi, tu es là aussi ?
Femme : Oui, je vais acheter des livres, des stylos et des cahiers car le nouveau semestre commence bientôt.

#######

Man: Oh Sumi, are you here too?
Woman: Yes, I'm going to buy books, pens, and notebooks because the new semester starts soon.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Oh Sumi, ¿tú también estás aquí?
Mujer: Sí, voy a comprar libros, bolígrafos y cuadernos porque pronto empieza el nuevo semestre.

#######

Man: Oh Sumi, are you here too?
Woman: Yes, I'm going to buy books, pens, and notebooks because the new semester starts soon.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Wanita: Ya, saya akan membeli buku, pulpen, dan buku catatan karena semester baru akan segera dimulai.

#######

Man: Oh Sumi, are you here too?
Woman: Yes, I'm going to buy books, pens, and notebooks because the new semester starts soon.

--------------------
공책: Vở
펜: Bút

V + (으)러 가다: Đi (đâu) để.
V/A + (으)니까: Vì ... nên.

Bút, sách, vở thường được bán ở hiệu sách, cửa hàng văn phòng phẩm nên đáp án phù hợp nhất là 3.

4. Cinema

<g>펜:</g> Pen

<g>V + (으)러 가다:</g> To go to somewhere in order to do something.
<g>V/A + (으)니까:</g> Because.

Pens, books, and notebooks are often sold in bookstores and stationery stores, so the correct answer is 3.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 역사책은 찾고 싶은데요.
남자: 역사책은 한 층에 있습니다. 내려가세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tôi muốn tìm sách lịch sử.
Nam: Sách lịch sử ở tầng 1. Chị đi xuống dưới nhé.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I want to find history books.
Man: History books are on the first floor. You need to go down.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Voglio trovare libri di storia.
Uomo: I libri di storia sono al primo piano. Devi andare giù.

#######

Woman: I want to find history books.
Man: History books are on the first floor. You need to go down.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Homme : Les livres d’histoire sont au premier étage. Vous devez descendre.

#######

Woman: I want to find history books.
Man: History books are on the first floor. You need to go down.

Woman: I want to find history books.

#######

Woman: I want to find history books.

#######

Woman: I want to find history books.
Man: History books are on the first floor. You need to go down.

#######

Woman: I want to find history books.
Man: History books are on the first floor. You need to go down.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：我想找歷史書。
男：歷史書在一樓。你需要下去。

#######

Woman: I want to find history books.

g_text_audio_translate.ru:

Мужчина: Книги по истории находятся на первом этаже. Вам нужно спуститься.

#######

Woman: I want to find history books.
Man: History books are on the first floor. You need to go down.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง : ฉันต้องการหาหนังสือประวัติศาสตร์
ผู้ชาย: หนังสือประวัติศาสตร์อยู่ที่ชั้นหนึ่ง คุณต้องลงไป

#######

Woman: I want to find history books.
Man: History books are on the first floor. You need to go down.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Quero encontrar livros de história.
Homem: Os livros de história ficam no primeiro andar. Você precisa descer.

#######

Woman: I want to find history books.
Man: History books are on the first floor. You need to go down.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मैं इतिहास की किताबें ढूँढना चाहती हूँ।
आदमी: इतिहास की किताबें पहली मंजिल पर हैं। तुम्हें नीचे जाना होगा.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 민수 씨, 10번 버스가 왔어요.
남자: 그럼 먼저 갈게요. 안녕.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Minsoo này, xe bus số 10 đến rồi.
Nam: Vậy tớ đi trước nhé. Tạm biệt.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Minsoo, bus number 10 is here.
Man: Then I'll go first. Bye.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Minsoo, l'autobus numero 10 è qui.
Uomo: Allora andrò per primo. Ciao.

#######

Woman: Minsoo, bus number 10 is here.
Man: Then I'll go first. Bye.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Minsoo, le bus numéro 10 est ici.
Homme : Alors je vais commencer. Au revoir.

#######

Woman: Minsoo, bus number 10 is here.
Man: Then I'll go first. Bye.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Minsoo, el autobús número 10 ya está aquí.
Hombre: Entonces iré primero. Adiós.

#######

Woman: Minsoo, bus number 10 is here.
Man: Then I'll go first. Bye.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Minsoo, bus nomor 10 sudah datang.
Pria : Kalau begitu aku pergi dulu. Selamat tinggal.

#######

Woman: Minsoo, bus number 10 is here.
Man: Then I'll go first. Bye.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: ミンスさん、10 番のバスが来ました。
男性: では、私が先に行きます。さよなら。

#######

Woman: Minsoo, bus number 10 is here.
Man: Then I'll go first. Bye.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Minsoo, Bus Nummer 10 ist da.
Mann: Dann gehe ich zuerst. Tschüss.

#######

Woman: Minsoo, bus number 10 is here.
Man: Then I'll go first. Bye.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：民秀，10 路公交车到了。
男：那我先走了。再见。

#######

Woman: Minsoo, bus number 10 is here.
Man: Then I'll go first. Bye.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：民秀，10 路公交車到了。
男：那我先走了。再見。

#######

Woman: Minsoo, bus number 10 is here.
Man: Then I'll go first. Bye.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Минсу, автобус номер 10 уже здесь.
Мужчина: Тогда я пойду первым. Пока.

#######

Woman: Minsoo, bus number 10 is here.
Man: Then I'll go first. Bye.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: มินซู รถบัสหมายเลข 10 มาแล้ว
ผู้ชาย : งั้นฉันไปก่อนนะ ลาก่อน.

#######

Woman: Minsoo, bus number 10 is here.
Man: Then I'll go first. Bye.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 통장을 만들고 싶은데요. 뭐가 필요해요?
남자: 먼저 신분증 좀 보여 주세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nam: Trước tiên chị cho tôi xem chứng minh nhân dân nhé.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I want to open a bank account. What do you need?
Man: Please show me your ID first.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Voglio aprire un conto in banca. Di che cosa hai bisogno?
Uomo: Per favore, mostrami prima la tua carta d'identità.

Man: Please show me your ID first.

Homme : S'il vous plaît, montrez-moi d'abord votre pièce d'identité.

#######

Woman: I want to open a bank account. What do you need?
Man: Please show me your ID first.

Hombre: Por favor, muéstrame tu identificación primero.

Man: Please show me your ID first.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 여기는 뭐가 맛있어요?
여자: 다 맛있지만 보쌈이 가장 맛있어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Ở đây có gì ngon nhỉ?
Nữ: Tất cả đều ngon nhưng bossam là ngon nhất.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What's delicious here?
Woman: Everything is delicious, but bossam is the best.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Cosa c'è di delizioso qui?
Donna: Tutto è delizioso, ma il bossam è il migliore.

#######

Man: What's delicious here?
Woman: Everything is delicious, but bossam is the best.

Femme : Tout est délicieux, mais le bossam est le meilleur.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 이 신문은 얼마예요?
여자: 이천 원입니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Báo này bao nhiêu tiền vậy?
Nữ: 2000 won.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: How much is this newspaper?
Woman: Two thousand won.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Quanto costa questo giornale?
Donna: Duemila won.

#######

Man: How much is this newspaper?

explain.vi:
1. Khách sạn
2. Ngân hàng
3. Siêu thị
4. Hiệu thuốc
--------------------
식사 후: Sau khi ăn
드시다: Ăn, uống (Kính ngữ của 먹다)

Bị đau đầu và sốt sẽ cần uống thuốc nên đáp án 4 là phù hợp nhất (người bán thuốc đang hướng dẫn cách uống thuốc).
explain.en:
1. Hotel 
2. Bank 
3. Mart
4. Pharmacy 
--------------------
<g>식사 후:</g> After meal
<g>드시다:</g> To eat, to drink, to take (Honorific form of <g>먹다</g>)

If you have a headache and a fever, you need to take medicine, so the most suitable answer is 4 (the pharmacist is giving instructions on how to take the medicine).
explain.it:

2. Banca
3.Mart
4. Farmacia
--------------------
<g>식사 후:</g>Dopo il pasto
<g>드시다:</g>Mangiare, bere, prendere (forma onorifica di<g>먹다</g>)

Se hai mal di testa e febbre devi prendere delle medicine, quindi la risposta più adatta è 4 (il farmacista dà istruzioni su come assumere la medicina).

<g>드시다:</g> To eat, to drink, to take (Honorific form of <g>먹다</g>)

If you have a headache and a fever, you need to take medicine, so the most suitable answer is 4 (the pharmacist is giving instructions on how to take the medicine).

2. Banque
3. Marché
4. Pharmacie
--------------------
<g>식사 후:</g>Après manger
<g>드시다:</g>Manger, boire, prendre (Forme honorifique de<g>먹다</g>)

Si vous avez des maux de tête et de la fièvre, vous devez prendre des médicaments, la réponse la plus appropriée est donc 4 (le pharmacien vous donne des instructions sur la façon de prendre les médicaments).

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I'm going to Jeonju. How many times do I have to transfer?
Man: You have to transfer twice.

महिला को गंतव्य तक पहुंचने के लिए स्थानांतरण करना पड़ता है, इसलिए 2 सही उत्तर है।

general.g_text_audio:

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: A lot of people play soccer.
Man: Yes, many people come here to play soccer on the weekends.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

Donna: Sto leggendo un romanzo inglese.

Nam: Không, đi ba điểm nữa là tới.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Uncle, is Dongdaemun Market still far away?
Man: No, just three more stops.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Zio, il mercato di Dongdaemun è ancora lontano?
Uomo: No, solo altre tre fermate.

#######

Woman: Uncle, is Dongdaemun Market still far away?
Man: No, just three more stops.

Homme : Non, encore trois arrêts.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 사과가 얼마예요?
여자: 이건 한 개에 500원짜리이고 그건 한 개에 400원짜리예요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Táo này bao nhiêu vậy ạ?
Nữ: Chỗ này một quả 500 won, chỗ kia thì 400 won.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Quanto costano le mele?
Donna: Questi sono 500 vinti ciascuno e quelli sono 400 vinti ciascuno.

#######

Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Combien coûtent les pommes ?
Femme : Ceux-ci valent 500 wons chacun et ceux-ci valent 400 wons chacun.

#######

Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Mujer: Estos son 500 wones cada uno y esos son 400 wones cada uno.

#######

Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Berapa harga apelnya?
Wanita: Ini masing-masing 500 won dan masing-masing 400 won.

#######

Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: リンゴはいくらですか?
女性: これは 500 ウォン、あれは 400 ウォンです。

#######

Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

Frau: Das sind jeweils 500 Won und die sind jeweils 400 Won.

#######

Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：苹果多少钱？
女：这些是500韩元，那些是400韩元。

#######

Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.

女：這些是500韓元，那些是400韓元。

#######

Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Сколько стоят яблоки?
Женщина: Это по 500 вон каждый, а те по 400 вон каждый.

#######

Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: แอปเปิ้ลราคาเท่าไหร่?
ผู้หญิง: อันละ 500 วอน และอันละ 400 วอน

#######

Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Quanto custam as maçãs?
Mulher: Estes são 500 won cada e aqueles são 400 won cada.

#######

Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: सेब कितने के हैं?
महिला: ये 500-500 जीते हुए हैं और वो 400-400 जीते हुए हैं।

#######

Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Elmalar ne kadar?
Kadın: Bunların tanesi 500 won, bunların tanesi 400 won.

#######

Man: How much are the apples?
Woman: These are 500 won each and those are 400 won each.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 방 청소하고 있어요? 제가 도와 드릴게요.
여자: 고마워요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Cậu đang dọn phòng? Tớ sẽ phụ cậu.
Nữ: Cảm ơn cậu.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Are you cleaning your room? Let me help you.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Stai pulendo la tua stanza? Lascia che ti aiuti.
Donna: Grazie.

#######

Man: Are you cleaning your room? Let me help you.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Tu nettoies ta chambre ? Laissez-moi vous aider.
Femme : Merci.

#######

Man: Are you cleaning your room? Let me help you.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Estás limpiando tu habitación? Deja que te ayude.
Mujer: Gracias.

#######

Man: Are you cleaning your room? Let me help you.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apakah kamu membersihkan kamarmu? Biarkan saya membantu Anda.
Wanita: Terima kasih.

#######

Man: Are you cleaning your room? Let me help you.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男「部屋の掃除してるの？」手伝わせてください。
女性: ありがとうございます。

#######

Man: Are you cleaning your room? Let me help you.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Putzen Sie Ihr Zimmer? Lass mich dir helfen.
Frau: Danke.

#######

Man: Are you cleaning your room? Let me help you.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：你在打扫房间吗？我来帮你。
女：谢谢。

general.g_text_audio:

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Uncle, how often does the subway bound for Seoul come?
Man: It comes every ten minutes.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

Uomo: Arriva ogni dieci minuti.

title: [7～10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 생선은 싱싱하네요. 일 킬로 얼마예요?
남자: 삼만 원입니다. 많이 사면 깎아 드릴게요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Cá tươi quá. Một cân bao nhiêu tiền vậy?
Nam: 30 000 won. Chị mua nhiều đi tôi giảm giá cho.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: The fish is fresh. How much is a kilo?
Man: Thirty thousand won. If you buy a lot, I will give you a discount.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Il pesce è fresco. Quanto vale un chilo?
Uomo: Trentamila won. Se acquisti molto, ti darò uno sconto.

#######

Woman: The fish is fresh. How much is a kilo?
Man: Thirty thousand won. If you buy a lot, I will give you a discount.

Homme : Trente mille won. Si vous achetez beaucoup, je vous accorderai une réduction.

Woman: The fish is fresh. How much is a kilo?
Man: Thirty thousand won. If you buy a lot, I will give you a discount.

Mann: Dreißigtausend Won. Wenn Sie eine Menge kaufen, gebe ich Ihnen einen Rabatt.

title: 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 이번 휴가에 가족과 여행하려고 하는데요. 어디에 가면 좋을까요?
여자: 부산이 어때요? 여름에 바다에 가면 좋아요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi định đi du lịch với gia đình vào kỳ nghỉ lần này. Đi đâu thì được nhỉ?
Nữ: Anh thấy Busan thế nào? Đi biển vào mùa hè thì tuyệt lắm.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: I'm going to travel with my family this vacation. Where should I go?
Woman: How is Busan? It's good to go to the sea in summer.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 열심히 공부하세요. 다음 주에 시험이 있습니다. 
남자: 네, 알겠습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nam: Vâng, chúng em biết rồi ạ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Study hard. You will have an exam next week.
Man: Yes, teacher.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

Uomo: Sì, insegnante.

#######

Man: Yes, teacher.

Homme : Oui, professeur.

#######

Woman: Study hard. You will have an exam next week.

title: 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 어서 오세요. 뭘 드릴까요?
여자: 배추 주세요. 토마토도 주세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Mau vào đi. Chị lấy gì?
Nữ: Cho tôi cải thảo. Cho tôi cà chua nữa.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Welcome. What can I give you?
Woman: Cabbage, please. And tomatoes, please.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Benvenuto. Cosa posso darti?
Donna: Cavolo, per favore. E pomodori, per favore.

#######

Man: Welcome. What can I give you?
Woman: Cabbage, please. And tomatoes, please.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Bienvenue. Que puis-je vous donner ?
Femme : Du chou, s'il vous plaît. Et des tomates, s'il vous plaît.

#######

Man: Welcome. What can I give you?
Woman: Cabbage, please. And tomatoes, please.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Mujer: Repollo, por favor. Y tomates, por favor.

<g>V + 아/어 보다:</g>ที่จะลองทำอะไรบางอย่าง
<g>A + 아/어 보이다:</g>ให้ดู, ดูเหมือน.

ทั้งสองกำลังพูดถึงจาน ผู้หญิงบอกให้ผู้ชายลองกินดู ดังนั้น 1 จึงเป็นคำตอบที่ถูกต้อง (ลองกินหลังทำ)

#######

1. Kitchen 
2. Restaurant 
3. Bank
4. Store 
--------------------
<g>V + 아/어 보다:</g> To try doing something.
<g>A + 아/어 보이다:</g> To look, to seem.

The two are talking about a dish. The woman tells the man to try eating it, so 1 is the correct answer (try eating after making).
explain.pt:
1. Cozinha
2. Restaurante
3. Banco
4. Loja
--------------------
<g>V + 아/어 보다:</g>Para tentar fazer alguma coisa.
<g>A + 아/어 보이다:</g>Olhar, parecer.

Os dois estão conversando sobre um prato. A mulher diz ao homem para tentar comê-lo, então 1 é a resposta correta (experimente comer depois de fazer).

#######

4. Store

<g>A + 아/어 보이다:</g> To look, to seem.

<g>V + 아/어 보다:</g>कुछ करने की कोशिश करना.
<g>A + 아/어 보이다:</g>देखना, प्रतीत होना।

दोनों एक डिश के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं. महिला पुरुष से कहती है कि इसे खाकर देखो, तो सही उत्तर 1 है (बनाने के बाद खाकर देखो)।

<g>A + 아/어 보이다:</g> To look, to seem.

İkisi bir yemek hakkında konuşuyorlar. Kadın erkeğe onu yemeyi denemesini söyler, bu yüzden doğru cevap 1'dir (yaptıktan sonra yemeyi deneyin).

title: 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 당근과 파는 어떻게 해요?
남자: 당근은 일 킬로 오천 원이에요. 파는 일 킬로 팔천 원이에요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Cà rốt và hành bán thế nào vậy?
Nam: Cà rốt một cân 5000 won. Hành một cân 8000 won.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: How about carrots and green onions?
Man: Carrots cost 5,000 won a kilo. Green onions cost 8,000 won a kilo.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Che ne dici di carote e cipolle verdi?
Uomo: Le carote costano 5.000 won al chilo. Le cipolle verdi costano 8.000 won al chilo.

#######

Woman: How about carrots and green onions?
Man: Carrots cost 5,000 won a kilo. Green onions cost 8,000 won a kilo.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Homme : Les carottes coûtent 5 000 wons le kilo. Les oignons verts coûtent 8 000 wons le kilo.

Man: Carrots cost 5,000 won a kilo. Green onions cost 8,000 won a kilo.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Hombre: Las zanahorias cuestan 5.000 wones el kilo. Las cebollas verdes cuestan 8.000 wones el kilo.

Mann: Karotten kosten 5.000 Won pro Kilo. Frühlingszwiebeln kosten 8.000 Won pro Kilo.

Мужчина: Морковь стоит 5000 вон за килограмм. Зеленый лук стоит 8000 вон за килограмм.

Homem: As cenouras custam 5.000 won o quilo. A cebola verde custa 8.000 won o quilo.

title: 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 여기서 좀 쉬어요. 오래 뛰어서 너무 피곤해요.
남자: 네, 물을 좀 마셔요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Nghỉ ở đây một lát đi. Chạy lâu nên tôi mệt quá.
Nam: Vâng, chị uống chút nước đi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Take a break here. I am so tired from running for a long time.
Man: Yes, drink some water.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Fai una pausa qui. Sono così stanco di correre per molto tempo.
Uomo: Sì, bevi un po' d'acqua.

#######

Woman: Take a break here. I am so tired from running for a long time.
Man: Yes, drink some water.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Faites une pause ici. Je suis tellement fatiguée d'avoir couru longtemps.
Homme : Oui, bois de l'eau.

#######

Woman: Take a break here. I am so tired from running for a long time.
Man: Yes, drink some water.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Tómate un descanso aquí. Estoy muy cansado de correr durante tanto tiempo.
Hombre: Sí, bebe un poco de agua.

#######

Woman: Take a break here. I am so tired from running for a long time.
Man: Yes, drink some water.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Pria: Ya, minumlah air.

#######

Woman: Take a break here. I am so tired from running for a long time.
Man: Yes, drink some water.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

男性: はい、水を飲みましょう。

#######

Man: Yes, drink some water.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

Mann: Ja, trink etwas Wasser.

#######

Woman: Take a break here. I am so tired from running for a long time.
Man: Yes, drink some water.

男：嗯，喝点水。

Man: Yes, drink some water.

ผู้ชาย : ครับ ดื่มน้ำหน่อย

Homem: Sim, beba um pouco de água.

#######

Woman: Take a break here. I am so tired from running for a long time.
Man: Yes, drink some water.

title: 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 이 빨간색 옷은 어떠세요? 요즘 유행이에요.
남자: 그건 색이 너무 진해요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Chị thấy chiếc áo màu đỏ này thế nào? Dạo này đang mốt đó.
Nam: Cái đó màu hơi đậm.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: How about this red dress? It's fashionable these days.
Man: It's too dark in color.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Che ne dici di questo vestito rosso? Va di moda di questi tempi.
Uomo: È di colore troppo scuro.

#######

Woman: How about this red dress? It's fashionable these days.
Man: It's too dark in color.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Et cette robe rouge ? C'est à la mode ces jours-ci.
Homme : Sa couleur est trop foncée.

#######

Woman: How about this red dress? It's fashionable these days.
Man: It's too dark in color.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Qué tal este vestido rojo? Está de moda estos días.
Hombre: Es de color demasiado oscuro.

#######

Woman: How about this red dress? It's fashionable these days.
Man: It's too dark in color.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Bagaimana dengan gaun merah ini? Ini modis akhir-akhir ini.
Pria: Warnanya terlalu gelap.

#######

Woman: How about this red dress? It's fashionable these days.
Man: It's too dark in color.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

title: 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 음식 맛이 어때요?
남자: 다 맛있지만 김치가 너무 매워요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Đồ ăn thế nào?
Nam: Đều ngon cả nhưng kimchi cay quá.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Che sapore ha il cibo?
Uomo: Va tutto bene, ma il kimchi è troppo piccante.

#######

Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Quel est le goût de la nourriture ?
Homme : Tout est bon, mais le kimchi est trop épicé.

#######

Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Cómo sabe la comida?
Hombre: Todo está bien, pero el kimchi está demasiado picante.

#######

Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Bagaimana rasanya makanannya?
Pria: Semuanya enak, tapi kimchinya terlalu pedas.

#######

Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: 食べ物の味はどうですか?
男性: どれも美味しいですが、キムチが辛すぎます。

#######

Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Wie schmeckt das Essen?
Mann: Alles ist gut, aber das Kimchi ist zu scharf.

#######

Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：食物味道怎么样？
男：什么都好，就是泡菜太辣了。

#######

Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：食物味道怎麼樣？
男：什麼都好，就是泡菜太辣了。

#######

Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Какой вкус еды?
Мужчина: Все хорошо, но кимчи слишком острое.

#######

Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: อาหารรสชาติเป็นยังไงบ้าง?
ผู้ชาย: ทุกอย่างดีหมด แต่กิมจิเผ็ดเกินไป

#######

Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Qual é o sabor da comida?
Homem: Está tudo bom, mas o kimchi está muito picante.

#######

Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: खाने का स्वाद कैसा है?
आदमी: सब कुछ अच्छा है, लेकिन किमची बहुत मसालेदार है।

#######

Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Yemeğin tadı nasıl?
Adam: Her şey güzel ama kimchi çok baharatlı.

#######

Woman: How does the food taste?
Man: Everything is good, but the kimchi is too spicy.

title: 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 수미 씨 노래를 잘 부르네요. 여기에 자주 가요?
여자: 고마워요. 저는 한 달 한 번쯤 가요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Sumi hát hay quá. Sumi có hay tới đây không?
Nữ: Cảm ơn anh. Một tháng tôi tới khoảng một lần.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Sumi, canti bene. Vieni qui spesso?
Donna: Grazie. Vengo una volta al mese.

#######

Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Sumi, tu chantes bien. Vous venez souvent ici?
Femme : Merci. Je viens une fois par mois.

#######

Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Sumi, cantas bien. ¿Vienes aqui a menudo?
Mujer: Gracias. Vengo una vez al mes.

#######

Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Sumi, kamu bernyanyi dengan baik. Apakah kamu sering kesini?
Wanita: Terima kasih. Saya datang sebulan sekali.

#######

Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: スミさん、歌が上手ですね。あなたはここによく来ますか？
女性: ありがとうございます。月に一度来ます。

#######

Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Sumi, du singst gut. Kommst du oft hierher?
Frau: Danke. Ich komme einmal im Monat.

#######

Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：苏美，你唱歌很好听。你常来这里吗？
女：谢谢。我每个月来一次。

#######

Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：蘇美，你唱歌很好聽。你常來這裡嗎？
女：謝謝。我每個月來一次。

#######

Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Суми, ты хорошо поешь. Вы сюда часто ходите?
Женщина: Спасибо. Я приезжаю раз в месяц.

#######

Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ซูมิ คุณร้องเพลงเก่งนะ คุณมาที่นี่บ่อยไหม?
ผู้หญิง: ขอบคุณ. ฉันมาเดือนละครั้ง

#######

Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Sumi, você canta bem. Você vem aqui frequentemente?
Mulher: Obrigada. Venho uma vez por mês.

#######

Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: सुमि, तुम अच्छा गाती हो. क्या आप अक्सर यहां आते हैं?
महिला: धन्यवाद. मैं महीने में एक बार आता हूं.

#######

Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Sumi, iyi şarkı söylüyorsun. Buraya sık gelir misin?
Kadın: Teşekkür ederim. Ayda bir geliyorum.

#######

Man: Sumi, you sing well. Do you come here often?
Woman: Thank you. I come once a month.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 어서 오세요. 뭘 드릴까요? 
여자: 오렌지 열 개 주세요.

g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: Welcome. What would you like? Woman: Ten oranges, please.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Xin mời vào. Quý khách cần gì ạ?
Nữ: Cho tôi 10 trái cam.
g_text_audio_translate.ar: الرجل : مرحبا . ماذا تريد؟ المرأة: عشر برتقالات من فضلك.
g_text_audio_translate.ru: Мужчина: Добро пожаловать. Что бы вы хотели? Женщина: Десять апельсинов, пожалуйста.
g_text_audio_translate.de: Mann: Willkommen. Was möchtest du? Frau: Zehn Orangen, bitte.
g_text_audio_translate.fr: Homme : Bienvenue. Qu'est-ce que tu voudrais? Femme : Dix oranges, s'il vous plaît.
g_text_audio_translate.id: Pria: Selamat datang. Apa yang kamu inginkan? Wanita: Tolong, sepuluh jeruk.
g_text_audio_translate.it: Uomo: Benvenuto. Cosa ti piacerebbe? Donna: Dieci arance, per favore.
g_text_audio_translate.ja: 男性: ようこそ。あなたは何をしたい？女性: オレンジを 10 個ください。
g_text_audio_translate.pt: Homem: Bem-vindo. O que você gostaria? Mulher: Dez laranjas, por favor.
g_text_audio_translate.th: ผู้ชาย: ยินดีต้อนรับ. คุณต้องการอะไร? ผู้หญิง: ขอส้มสิบลูก
g_text_audio_translate.tr: Adam: Hoş geldiniz. Ne alırsınız? Kadın: On portakal lütfen.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN: 男：欢迎。你要什么？女：请给我十个橙子。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW: 男：歡迎。你要什麼？女：請給我十個橘子。
g_text_audio_translate.hi: आदमी: स्वागत है. आप क्या पसंद करेंगे? महिला: कृपया दस संतरे।
g_text_audio_translate.es: Hombre: Bienvenido. ¿Qué le gustaría? Mujer: Diez naranjas, por favor.

explain.en:
1. Flower shop
2. Theater
3. School
4. Market
--------------------
The woman buys oranges so we can deduce that this is a market. 4 is the correct answer.
explain.vi:
1. Tiệm hoa
2. Nhà hát, rạp chiếu phim
3. Trường học
4. Chợ
--------------------
Nhân vật nữ mua cam nên suy ra đây là chợ. 4 là đáp án đúng.
explain.ar:
1. محل زهور
2. المسرح
3. المدرسة
4. السوق
--------------------
تشتري المرأة البرتقال حتى نستنتج أن هذا سوق. 4 هو الجواب الصحيح.
explain.ru:
1. Цветочный магазин
2. Театр
3. Школа
4. Рынок
--------------------
Женщина покупает апельсины, поэтому мы можем сделать вывод, что это рынок. 4 – правильный ответ.
explain.de:
1. Blumenladen
2. Theater
3. Schule
4. Markt
--------------------
Die Frau kauft Orangen, woraus wir schließen können, dass es sich hier um einen Markt handelt. 4 ist die richtige Antwort.
explain.fr:
1. Magasin de fleurs
2. Théâtre
3. École
4. Marché
--------------------
La femme achète des oranges, on peut donc en déduire qu'il s'agit d'un marché. 4 est la bonne réponse.
explain.id:
1. Toko Bunga
2. Teater
3. Sekolah
4. Pasar
--------------------
Wanita itu membeli jeruk sehingga kita dapat menyimpulkan bahwa ini adalah pasar. 4 adalah jawaban yang benar.
explain.it:
1. Negozio di fiori
2. Teatro
3. Scuola
4. Mercato
--------------------
La donna compra delle arance quindi possiamo dedurre che si tratta di un mercato. 4 è la risposta corretta.
explain.ja:
1.フラワーショップ
2. 劇場
3. 学校
4. 市場
--------------------
女性はオレンジを買っているので、ここは市場であると推測できます。 4が正解です。
explain.pt:
1. Floricultura
2. Teatro
3. Escola
4. Mercado
--------------------
A mulher compra laranjas para que possamos deduzir que se trata de um mercado. 4 é a resposta correta.
explain.th:
1.ร้านดอกไม้
2. โรงละคร
3. โรงเรียน
4. ตลาดนัด
-
ผู้หญิงซื้อส้มเพื่อสรุปได้ว่านี่คือตลาด 4 คือคำตอบที่ถูกต้อง
explain.tr:
1. Çiçekçi
2. Tiyatro
3. Okul
4. Pazar
--------------------
Kadın portakal alıyor, bu yüzden buranın bir pazar olduğunu anlayabiliriz. 4 doğru cevaptır.
explain.zh-CN:
1. 花店
2. 剧院
3. 学校
4、市场
--------------------
这位女士买了橙子，所以我们可以推断这是一个市场。 4 是正确答案。
explain.zh-TW:
1. 花店
2. 劇院
3. 學校
4、市場
--------------------
這位女士買了橙子，所以我們可以推斷這是一個市場。 4 是正確答案。
explain.hi:
1. फूलों की दुकान
2. रंगमंच
3. स्कूल
4. बाज़ार
-------------------
महिला संतरे खरीदती है इसलिए हम यह अनुमान लगा सकते हैं कि यह एक बाजार है। 4 सही उत्तर है.
explain.es:
1. Floristería
2. Teatro
3. escuela
4. Mercado
--------------------
La mujer compra naranjas por lo que podemos deducir que se trata de un mercado. 4 es la respuesta correcta.

title: [7~10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 여기는 비빔밥이 맛있어요. 
남자: 그럼, 우리 비빔밥을 먹어요.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: The bibimbap here is delicious.
Man: Then, let's eat bibimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Cơm trộn ở đây rất ngon.
Nam: Vậy thì chúng ta ăn cơm trộn đi.
g_text_audio_translate.ar:
المرأة: البيبيمباب هنا لذيذ.
الرجل: إذن، دعونا نأكل البيبيمباب.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Пибимбап здесь очень вкусный.
Мужчина: Тогда давай съедим пибимбап.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Der Bibimbap hier ist köstlich.
Mann: Dann lasst uns Bibimbap essen.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Le bibimbap ici est délicieux.
Homme : Alors, mangeons du bibimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Bibimbap di sini enak.
Pria: Kalau begitu, ayo makan bibimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Il bibimbap qui è delizioso.
Uomo: Allora mangiamo bibimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: ここのビビンバはおいしいです。
男: じゃあ、ビビンバを食べましょう。
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: O bibimbap aqui é uma delícia.
Homem: Então vamos comer bibimbap.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: บิบิมบับที่นี่อร่อยนะ
ผู้ชาย : งั้นมากินบิบิมบับกัน
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Buradaki bibimbap çok lezzetli.
Adam: O zaman bibimbap yiyelim.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：这里的拌饭很好吃。
男：那我们吃拌饭吧。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：這裡的拌飯很好吃。
男：那我們吃拌飯吧。
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: यहाँ का बिबिंबैप स्वादिष्ट है।
आदमी: तो फिर, चलो बिबिंबैप खाते हैं।
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: El bibimbap de aquí está delicioso.
Hombre: Entonces, comamos bibimbap.

explain.en:
1. Bank
2. Restaurant
3. Library
4. Stationery store
--------------------
The two are talking about food so we can deduce that this is a restaurant. 2 is the correct answer.
explain.vi:
1. Ngân hàng
2. Nhà hàng
3. Thư viện
4. Cửa hàng văn phòng phẩm
--------------------
Hai nhân vật đang nói về đồ ăn nên suy ra đây là nhà hàng. 2 là đáp án đúng.
explain.ar:
1. البنك
2. مطعم
3. المكتبة
4. متجر القرطاسية
--------------------
يتحدث الاثنان عن الطعام حتى نتمكن من استنتاج أن هذا مطعم. 2 هي الإجابة الصحيحة.
explain.ru:
1. Банк
2. Ресторан
3. Библиотека
4. Магазин канцелярских товаров
--------------------
Эти двое говорят о еде, поэтому мы можем сделать вывод, что это ресторан. 2 правильный ответ.
explain.de:
1. Bank
2. Restaurant
3. Bibliothek
4. Schreibwarenladen
--------------------
Da die beiden über Essen reden, können wir daraus schließen, dass es sich um ein Restaurant handelt. 2 ist die richtige Antwort.
explain.fr:
1. Banque
2. Restaurant
3. Bibliothèque
4. Papeterie
--------------------
Les deux parlent de nourriture donc on peut en déduire qu'il s'agit d'un restaurant. 2 est la bonne réponse.
explain.id:
1.Bank
2. Restoran
3. Perpustakaan
4. Toko alat tulis
--------------------
Keduanya berbicara tentang makanan sehingga kita dapat menyimpulkan bahwa ini adalah sebuah restoran. 2 adalah jawaban yang benar.
explain.it:
1. Banca
2. Ristorante
3. Biblioteca
4. Negozio di cartoleria
--------------------
I due stanno parlando di cibo quindi possiamo dedurre che si tratti di un ristorante. 2 è la risposta corretta.
explain.ja:
1.銀行
2. レストラン
3. 図書館
4. 文具店
--------------------
二人は食べ物について話しているので、ここはレストランであると推測できます。 2が正解です。
explain.pt:
1. Banco
2. Restaurante
3. Biblioteca
4. Papelaria
--------------------
Os dois estão conversando sobre comida então podemos deduzir que se trata de um restaurante. 2 é a resposta correta.
explain.th:
1. ธนาคาร
2. ร้านอาหาร
3. ห้องสมุด
4. ร้านเครื่องเขียน
-
ทั้งสองคุยกันเรื่องอาหารก็เลยสรุปได้ว่านี่คือร้านอาหาร 2 คือคำตอบที่ถูกต้อง
explain.tr:
1. Banka
2. Restoran
3. Kütüphane
4. Kırtasiye mağazası
--------------------
İkisi yemekten bahsediyor, bu yüzden buranın bir restoran olduğu sonucunu çıkarabiliriz. 2 doğru cevaptır.
explain.zh-CN:
1. 银行
2. 餐厅
3. 图书馆
4.文具店
--------------------
两人正在谈论食物，所以我们可以推断这是一家餐厅。 2 是正确答案。
explain.zh-TW:
1. 銀行
2. 餐廳
3. 圖書館
4.文具店
--------------------
兩人正在談論食物，所以我們可以推斷這是一家餐廳。 2 是正確答案。
explain.hi:
1. बैंक
2. भोजनालय
3. पुस्तकालय
4. स्टेशनरी की दुकान
------------------------
दोनों खाने के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं तो हम अंदाजा लगा सकते हैं कि यह एक रेस्टोरेंट है। 2 सही उत्तर है.
explain.es:
1. banco
2. Restaurante
3. Biblioteca
4. Papelería
--------------------
Los dos están hablando de comida por lo que podemos deducir que se trata de un restaurante. 2 es la respuesta correcta.

title: [7~10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 이 구두를 신어 보고 싶어요. 
여자: 네. 이쪽으로 오세요.

g_text_audio_translate.en: Man: I'd like to try on these shoes. Woman: Okay. Please come this way.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi muốn thử đôi giày này.
Nữ: Vâng. Hãy đi hướng này ạ.
g_text_audio_translate.ar: الرجل: أود تجربة هذا الحذاء. المرأة: حسنًا. من فضلك تعال بهذه الطريقة.
g_text_audio_translate.ru: Мужчина: Я бы хотел примерить эти туфли. Женщина: Хорошо. Пожалуйста, пройдите сюда.
g_text_audio_translate.de: Mann: Ich würde diese Schuhe gerne anprobieren. Frau: Okay. Bitte kommen Sie hier entlang.
g_text_audio_translate.fr: Homme : J'aimerais essayer ces chaussures. Femme : D’accord. S'il vous plaît, venez par ici.
g_text_audio_translate.id: Pria: Saya ingin mencoba sepatu ini. Wanita: Oke. Silakan lewat sini.
g_text_audio_translate.it: Uomo: Mi piacerebbe provare queste scarpe. Donna: Va bene. Per favore, vieni da questa parte.
g_text_audio_translate.ja: 男性: この靴を試着したいのですが。女性: わかりました。こちらに来てください。
g_text_audio_translate.pt: Homem: Eu gostaria de experimentar esses sapatos. Mulher: Ok. Por favor, venha por aqui.
g_text_audio_translate.th: ชาย: ฉันอยากลองรองเท้าคู่นี้ ผู้หญิง: เอาล่ะ เชิญทางนี้ครับ.
g_text_audio_translate.tr: Adam: Bu ayakkabıları denemek isterim. Kadın: Tamam. Lütfen bu tarafa gelin.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN: 男：我想试穿这双鞋。女：好的。请这边来。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW: 男：我想試穿這雙鞋。女：好的。請這邊來。
g_text_audio_translate.hi: आदमी: मैं ये जूते आज़माना चाहूँगा। महिला: ठीक है. कृपया इस तरफ आएं।
g_text_audio_translate.es: Hombre: Me gustaría probarme estos zapatos. Mujer: Está bien. Por favor ven por aquí.

explain.en:
1. Department store
2. Travel agency
3. Post office
4. Museum
-------------------
The man is a customer who wants to try on shoes, and the woman is a sales clerk. 1 is the correct answer.
explain.vi:
1. Trung tâm thương mại
2. Công ty du lịch
3. Bưu điện
4. Viện bảo tàng
--------------------
Nhân vật nam là khách hàng, muốn đi thử giày, và nhân vật nữ là nhân viên bán hàng. 1 là đáp án đúng.
explain.ar:
1. متجر متعدد الأقسام
2. وكالة السفر
3. مكتب البريد
4. المتحف
-------------------
الرجل عميل يريد تجربة الأحذية، والمرأة موظفة مبيعات. 1 هو الجواب الصحيح.
explain.ru:
1. Универмаг
2. Туристическое агентство
3. Почтовое отделение
4. Музей
-------------------
Мужчина — покупатель, который хочет примерить обувь, а женщина — продавец. 1 – правильный ответ.
explain.de:
1. Kaufhaus
2. Reisebüro
3. Postamt
4. Museum
-------------------
Der Mann ist ein Kunde, der Schuhe anprobieren möchte, und die Frau ist eine Verkäuferin. 1 ist die richtige Antwort.
explain.fr:
1. Grand magasin
2. Agence de voyages
3. Bureau de poste
4. Musée
-------------------
L’homme est un client qui veut essayer des chaussures et la femme est vendeuse. 1 est la bonne réponse.
explain.id:
1. Toserba
2. Agen perjalanan
3. Kantor pos
4.Museum
-------------------
Laki-laki adalah pelanggan yang ingin mencoba sepatu, dan perempuan adalah petugas penjualan. 1 adalah jawaban yang benar.
explain.it:
1. Grande magazzino
2. Agenzia di viaggi
3. Ufficio postale
4. Museo
-------------------
L'uomo è un cliente che vuole provare le scarpe e la donna è un'addetta alle vendite. 1 è la risposta corretta.
explain.ja:
1. デパート
2. 旅行代理店
3. 郵便局
4. 博物館
-------------------
男性は靴の試着を希望する客、女性は店員。 1 が正解です。
explain.pt:
1. Loja de departamentos
2. Agência de viagens
3. Correios
4. Museu
-------------------
O homem é um cliente que quer experimentar sapatos e a mulher é balconista. 1 é a resposta correta.
explain.th:
1. ห้างสรรพสินค้า
2. ตัวแทนการท่องเที่ยว
3. ที่ทำการไปรษณีย์
4. พิพิธภัณฑ์
-
ผู้ชายเป็นลูกค้าที่ต้องการลองรองเท้า ส่วนผู้หญิงเป็นพนักงานขาย 1 คือคำตอบที่ถูกต้อง
explain.tr:
1. Büyük mağaza
2. Seyahat acentesi
3. Postane
4. Müze
-------------------
Erkek ayakkabı denemek isteyen bir müşteri, kadın ise satış elemanıdır. 1 doğru cevaptır.
explain.zh-CN:
1.百货商店
2、旅行社
3. 邮局
4. 博物馆
-------------------
男的是要试鞋的顾客，女的是售货员。 1 是正确答案。
explain.zh-TW:
1.百貨公司
2、旅行社
3. 郵局
4. 博物館
-------------------
男的是要試鞋的顧客，女的是售貨員。 1 是正確答案。
explain.hi:
1. डिपार्टमेंट स्टोर
2. ट्रैवल एजेंसी
3. डाकघर
4. संग्रहालय
-------------------
पुरुष एक ग्राहक है जो जूते पहनना चाहता है, और महिला एक सेल्स क्लर्क है। 1 सही उत्तर है.
explain.es:
1. Grandes almacenes
2. Agencia de viajes
3. oficina de correos
4. Museo
-------------------
El hombre es un cliente que quiere probarse zapatos y la mujer es dependienta. 1 es la respuesta correcta.

title: [7~10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 식사 후에 이 약을 드세요. 
남자: 감사합니다. 얼마예요?

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Take this medicine after your meal.
Man: Thank you. How much is it?
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Hãy uống thuốc này sau bữa ăn.
Nam: Cảm ơn. Bao nhiêu tiền ạ?
g_text_audio_translate.ar:
المرأة: خذ هذا الدواء بعد وجبتك.
الرجل: شكرا لك. كم سعره؟
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Примите это лекарство после еды.
Мужчина: Спасибо. Сколько это стоит?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Nehmen Sie dieses Arzneimittel nach dem Essen ein.
Mann: Danke. Wie viel kostet das?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Prenez ce médicament après votre repas.
Homme : Merci. Combien ça coûte?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Minumlah obat ini setelah makan.
Pria: Terima kasih. Berapa harganya?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: prendi questo medicinale dopo il pasto.
Uomo: Grazie. Quanto costa?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: この薬は食後に服用してください。
男性: ありがとうございます。いくらですか？
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Tome este medicamento após a refeição.
Homem: Obrigado. Quanto isso custa?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: รับประทานยานี้หลังมื้ออาหาร
ผู้ชาย: ขอบคุณ. เท่าไหร่คะ?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Bu ilacı yemekten sonra al.
Adam: Teşekkür ederim. Ne kadar?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：饭后服用此药。
男：谢谢。多少钱？
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：飯後服用此藥。
男：謝謝。多少錢？

Nhân vật nữ đang bán thuốc cho nhân vật nam. 2 là đáp án đúng.

title: [7~10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 이 장미는 얼마예요? 
여자: 한 송이에 이천 원입니다, 손님.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: How much are these roses?
Woman: Two thousand won each, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Hoa hồng này giá bao nhiêu?
Nữ: Hai nghìn won một bông, thưa quý khách.
g_text_audio_translate.ar:
الرجل: بكم الوردتين؟
المرأة: ألفي وون للواحدة يا سيدي.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Сколько стоят эти розы?
Женщина: Две тысячи вон каждая, сэр.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Wie viel kosten diese Rosen?
Frau: Zweitausend Won pro Stück, Sir.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Combien coûtent ces roses ?
Femme : Deux mille wons chacune, monsieur.
g_text_audio_translate.id: Pria: Berapa harga mawar-mawar ini? Wanita: Dua ribu won masing-masing, Tuan.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Quanto costano queste rose?
Donna: Duemila won ciascuna, signore.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：このバラはいくらですか？
女性：1本2000ウォンでございます。
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Quanto custam essas rosas?
Mulher: Dois mil wons cada, senhor.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ชาย: ดอกกุหลาบพวกนี้ราคาเท่าไรคะ
หญิง: ดอกละสองพันวอนค่ะ
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Bu güller ne kadar?
Kadın: Her biri iki bin won, efendim.
g_text_audio_translate.tw:
Ɔbarima: Rose yi yɛ ahe?
Ɔbea: Mpem abien dii nkonim biara, owura.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: ये गुलाब कितने के हैं?
महिला: दो-दो हज़ार वोन, सर।
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मान्छे: यी गुलाबहरूको कति मूल्य पर्छ?
महिला: दुई हजार वोन, सर।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ តើផ្កាកុលាបទាំងនេះមានតម្លៃប៉ុន្មាន?
ស្ត្រី៖ មួយម៉ឺនវ៉ុន លោកម្ចាស់។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: මේ රෝස මල් කීයද?
කාන්තාව: සර්, එකෙකුට දෙදහසක් දිනුවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
লোক: এই গোলাপগুলোর দাম কত?
মহিলা: দুই হাজার করে ওন, স্যার।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
ယောက်ျား : ဒီနှင်းဆီတွေ ဘယ်လောက်လဲ။
အမျိုးသမီး : တစ်ယောက်ကို ဝမ်နှစ်ထောင်၊
g_text_audio_translate.es: Hombre: ¿Cuánto cuestan estas rosas? Mujer: Dos mil wones cada una, señor.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：这些玫瑰多少钱？
女：先生，每朵两千韩元。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：這些玫瑰多少錢？
女：先生，每朵兩千韓元。

title: [7~10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 민수 씨는 여기에서 자주 산책해요? 
남자: 네. 나무가 많아서 자주 와요.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Do you often take walks here, Minsu?
Man: Yes. There are a lot of trees, so I come here often.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Minsu, anh có thường đi dạo ở đây không?
Nam: Có. Tôi thường đến đây vì ở đây có rất nhiều cây.
g_text_audio_translate.ar:
المرأة: هل تتمشى هنا كثيرًا يا مينسو؟
الرجل: نعم. الأشجار كثيرة، لذا آتي إلى هنا كثيرًا.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Ты часто здесь гуляешь, Минсу?
Мужчина: Да. Здесь много деревьев, поэтому я часто сюда прихожу.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Gehst du hier oft spazieren, Minsu?
Mann: Ja. Es gibt hier viele Bäume, deshalb komme ich oft hierher.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Tu te promènes souvent ici, Minsu ?
Homme : Oui. Il y a beaucoup d’arbres, alors je viens souvent ici.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Kamu sering jalan-jalan di sini, Minsu?
Pria: Ya. Di sini banyak pohon, jadi aku sering ke sini.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Fai spesso passeggiate qui, Minsu?
Uomo: Sì. Ci sono molti alberi, quindi vengo qui spesso.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性：ミンスさん、よくここを散歩するんですか？
男性：ええ。木がたくさんあるので、よく来ます。
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Você costuma caminhar aqui, Minsu?
Homem: Sim. Tem muitas árvores, então venho aqui com frequência.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: คุณมินซูมาเดินเล่นที่นี่บ่อยไหม
ผู้ชาย: ใช่ครับ ต้นไม้เยอะมาก ผมเลยมาที่นี่บ่อย
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Minsu, burada sık sık yürüyüşe çıkıyor musun?
Erkek: Evet. Çok fazla ağaç var, bu yüzden sık sık buraya geliyorum.
g_text_audio_translate.tw:
Ɔbaa: Wotaa nantew wɔ ha, Minsu?
Ɔbarima: Yiw. Nnua pii wɔ hɔ, enti metaa ba ha.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्या तुम अक्सर यहाँ टहलने आते हो, मिंसू?
पुरुष: हाँ। यहाँ बहुत सारे पेड़ हैं, इसलिए मैं अक्सर यहाँ आता हूँ।
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
महिला: के तिमी यहाँ प्रायः घुम्छौ, मिन्सु?
पुरुष: हो। त्यहाँ धेरै रूखहरू छन्, त्यसैले म यहाँ प्रायः आउँछु।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
នារី៖ អូនមកដើរលេងនៅទីនេះញឹកញាប់ទេ?
បុរស៖ បាទ។ មានដើមឈើច្រើន ដូច្នេះខ្ញុំមកទីនេះញឹកញាប់។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: ඔයා නිතරම මෙහෙ ඇවිදිනවද මින්සු?
මිනිසා: ඔව්. ගස් ගොඩක් තියෙනවා, ඒ නිසා මම නිතරම මෙහෙ එනවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলা: মিনসু, তুমি কি এখানে প্রায়ই হাঁটতে যাও?

লোক: হ্যাঁ। অনেক গাছ আছে, তাই আমি প্রায়ই এখানে আসি।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
မိန်းမ : Minsu မင်းက ဒီမှာ လမ်းလျှောက်တတ်တယ်လား။
Man: ဟုတ်တယ်။ သစ်ပင်တွေ အများကြီးရှိလို့ ဒီကို ခဏခဏ ရောက်ဖြစ်တယ်။
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Pasea a menudo por aquí, Minsu?
Hombre: Sí. Hay muchos árboles, así que vengo a menudo.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：敏秀，你经常来这里散步吗？
男：是的。这里树很多，所以我经常来。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：敏秀，你常來這裡散步嗎？
男：是的。這裡樹很多，所以我常來。

title: [7~10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 손님, 어디가 아파서 오셨어요? 
여자: 머리가 좀 아파서요.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Ma'am, what's wrong with you?
Woman: I have a slight headache.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Quý khách, chị bị đau ở đâu?
Nữ: Tôi hơi đau đầu.
g_text_audio_translate.ar: الرجل: سيدتي، ما بك؟ المرأة: لديّ صداع خفيف.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Мэм, что с вами? 
Женщина: У меня немного болит голова.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Madam, was ist los mit Ihnen?
Frau: Ich habe leichte Kopfschmerzen.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Madame, qu’est-ce qui ne va pas chez vous ?
Femme : J’ai un léger mal de tête.
g_text_audio_translate.id: Pria: Nyonya, ada apa dengan Anda? Wanita: Saya sedikit pusing.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Signora, cosa le succede?
Donna: Ho un leggero mal di testa.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：奥様、どうされましたか？
女性：少し頭が痛いんです。
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Senhora, o que há de errado com a senhora?
Mulher: Estou com uma leve dor de cabeça.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ชาย: คุณผู้หญิงคะ เป็นอะไรหรือเปล่าคะ 
หญิง: ฉันปวดหัวนิดหน่อยค่ะ
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Hanımefendi, ne oldu size?
Kadın: Hafif bir baş ağrım var.
g_text_audio_translate.tw:
Man: Ma'am, dɛn na ɛhaw wo?
Ɔbea: Me ti yɛ me yaw kakra.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: मैडम, आपको क्या हुआ है?
महिला: मुझे हल्का सिरदर्द है।
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
पुरुष: श्रीमती, तपाईंलाई के भयो?

महिला: मेरो टाउको हल्का दुखेको छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ ម៉ាក់ អូនមានរឿងអី?
ស្ត្រី៖ ខ្ញុំឈឺក្បាលបន្តិច។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: මැඩම්, ඔයාට මොකද වෙලා තියෙන්නේ? 
කාන්තාව: මට පොඩි හිසරදයක් තියෙනවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
লোক: ম্যাডাম, আপনার কি হয়েছে? 
মহিলা: আমার হালকা মাথাব্যথা।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man: Ma'am မင်းဘာဖြစ်နေတာလဲ။
အမျိုးသမီး : ကျွန်တော် ခေါင်းနည်းနည်းကိုက်တယ်။
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Señora, ¿qué le pasa?
Mujer: Me duele un poco la cabeza.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：女士，您怎么了？
女：我有点头疼。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：女士，您怎麼了？
女：我有點頭痛。

title: [7~10] 여기는 어디입니까? <보기>와 같이 알맞은 것을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:

남자: 네, 책상은 이쪽에 있습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I'm here to buy a desk. 
Man: Yes, desks are over here.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tôi đến đây để mua bàn.
Nam: Vâng, bàn thì ở đằng này.

g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Я здесь, чтобы купить стол.
Мужчина: Да, столы здесь.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Ich bin hier, um einen Schreibtisch zu kaufen.
Mann: Ja, Schreibtische gibt es hier drüben.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Je suis ici pour acheter un bureau.
Homme : Oui, les bureaux sont là-bas.
g_text_audio_translate.id: Wanita: Saya di sini untuk membeli meja. Pria: Ya, meja ada di sini.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Sono qui per comprare una scrivania.
Uomo: Sì, le scrivanie sono qui.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性：机を買いに来ました。
男性：はい、机はここにあります。
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Estou aqui para comprar uma mesa.
Homem: Sim, as mesas estão aqui.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ฉันมาซื้อโต๊ะ 
ผู้ชาย: ใช่ โต๊ะอยู่ตรงนี้
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Ben bir masa almaya geldim.
Erkek: Evet, masalar burada.
g_text_audio_translate.tw:
Ɔbaa: Mewɔ ha sɛ merebɛtɔ desk. 
Ɔbarima: Yiw, desk ahorow wɔ ha.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मैं यहाँ डेस्क खरीदने आई हूँ।
पुरुष: हाँ, डेस्क यहाँ हैं।
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
महिला: म यहाँ डेस्क किन्न आएको हुँ। 
पुरुष: हो, डेस्कहरू यहाँ छन्।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ ខ្ញុំមកនេះដើម្បីទិញតុ។ 
បុរស៖ បាទ តុគឺនៅទីនេះ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: මම මේසයක් මිලදී ගැනීමට මෙහි සිටිමි. 
මිනිසා: ඔව්, මේස මෙහි තිබේ.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলা: আমি এখানে একটা ডেস্ক কিনতে এসেছি। 
পুরুষ: হ্যাঁ, ডেস্কগুলো এখানেই।
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Vengo a comprar un escritorio.
Hombre: Sí, los escritorios están por aquí.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：我来买桌子。
男：是的，桌子在这边。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：我來買桌子。
男：是的，桌子在這邊。

explain.km:

explain.si:

--------------------
කාන්තාව මේසයක් මිලදී ගනී. ඉතින් මෙය ගෘහ භාණ්ඩ ගබඩාවකි. 4 නිවැරදි පිළිතුරයි.
explain.bn:
